Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Algebra I. Part D.  Rigs and rings. Vladimir Voevodsky. Aug. 2011 - . *)
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
(** Contents
- Standard Algebraic Structures
 - Rigs - semirings with 1, 0, and x * 0 = 0 * x = 0
  - General definitions
  - Homomorphisms of rigs (rig functions)
  - Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal" on rigs
  - Subobjects
  - Quotient objects
  - Direct products
  - Opposite rigs
  - Nonzero rigs
  - Group of units
 - Commutative rigs
  - General definitions
  - Relations similar to "greater" on commutative rigs
  - Subobjects
  - Quotient objects
  - Direct products
  - Opposite commutative rigs
 - Rings
  - General definitions
  - Homomorphisms of rings
  - Computation lemmas for rings
  - Relations compatible with the additive structure on rings
  - Relations compatible with the multiplicative structure on rings
  - Relations "inversely compatible" with the multiplicative structure
    on rings
  - Relations on rings and ring homomorphisms
  - Subobjects
  - Quotient objects
  - Direct products
  - Opposite rings
  - Ring of differences associated with a rig
  - Canonical homomorphism to the ring associated with a rig (ring of
    differences)
  - Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal" on the ring
    associated with a rig
  - Relations and the canonical homomorphism to the ring associated
    with a rig (ring of differences)
 - Commutative rings
  - General definitions
  - Computational lemmas for commutative rings
  - Subobjects
  - Quotient objects
  - Direct products
  - Opposite commutative rings
  - Commutative rigs to commutative rings
  - Rings of fractions
  - Canonical homomorphism to the ring of fractions
  - Ring of fractions in the case when all elements which are being
    inverted are cancelable
  - Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal" on the rings
    of fractions
  - Relations and the canonical homomorphism to the ring of fractions
*)


(** ** Preamble *)

(** Settings *)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

(** Imports *)

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Orders.
Require Export UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.

Local Open Scope logic.

(** To upstream files *)


(** ** Standard Algebraic Structures (cont.) *)

(** *** Rigs - semirings with 1, 0 and x * 0 = 0 * x = 0 *)

(** **** General definitions *)

Definition rig : UU := ∑ (X : setwith2binop), isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X).

Definition make_rig {X : setwith2binop} (is : isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) : rig :=
  X ,, is.

Definition pr1rig : rig → setwith2binop :=
  @pr1 _ (λ X : setwith2binop, isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)).
Coercion pr1rig : rig >-> setwith2binop.

Definition rigaxs (X : rig) : isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 X.

Definition rigop1axs (X : rig) : isabmonoidop (@op1 X) := rigop1axs_is (pr2 X).

Definition rigassoc1 (X : rig) : isassoc (@op1 X) := assocax_is (rigop1axs X).

Definition rigunel1 {X : rig} : X := unel_is (rigop1axs X).

Definition riglunax1 (X : rig) : islunit op1 (@rigunel1 X) := lunax_is (rigop1axs X).

Definition rigrunax1 (X : rig) : isrunit op1 (@rigunel1 X) := runax_is (rigop1axs X).

Definition rigmult0x (X : rig) : ∏ x : X, op2 (@rigunel1 X) x = @rigunel1 X :=
  rigmult0x_is (pr2 X).

Definition rigmultx0 (X : rig) : ∏ x : X, op2 x (@rigunel1 X) = @rigunel1 X :=
  rigmultx0_is (pr2 X).

Definition rigcomm1 (X : rig) : iscomm (@op1 X) := commax_is (rigop1axs X).

Definition rigop2axs (X : rig) : ismonoidop (@op2 X) := rigop2axs_is (pr2 X).

Definition rigassoc2 (X : rig) : isassoc (@op2 X) := assocax_is (rigop2axs X).

Definition rigunel2 {X : rig} : X := unel_is (rigop2axs X).

Definition riglunax2 (X : rig) : islunit op2 (@rigunel2 X) := lunax_is (rigop2axs X).

Definition rigrunax2 (X : rig) : isrunit op2 (@rigunel2 X) := runax_is (rigop2axs X).

Definition rigdistraxs (X : rig) : isdistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 X).

Definition rigldistr (X : rig) : isldistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 X)).

Definition rigrdistr (X : rig) : isrdistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 X)).


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
rig


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
rig

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
rig
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isrigops op1 op2
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs))
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isdistr op1 op2

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 op2 (unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2))) x =
 unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   op2 x (unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2))) =
   unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)))

    apply (m0x ,, mx0).
  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isdistr op1 op2
 apply dax.
Defined.

Definition rigaddabmonoid (X : rig) : abmonoid :=
  make_abmonoid (make_setwithbinop X op1) (rigop1axs X).

Definition rigmultmonoid (X : rig) : monoid := make_monoid (make_setwithbinop X op2) (rigop2axs X).

Declare Scope rig_scope.
Notation "x + y" := (op1 x y) : rig_scope.
Notation "x * y" := (op2 x y) : rig_scope.
Notation "0" := (rigunel1) : rig_scope.
Notation "1" := (rigunel2) : rig_scope.

Delimit Scope rig_scope with rig.


(** **** Homomorphisms of rigs (rig functions) *)

Definition isrigfun {X Y : rig} (f : X → Y) : UU :=
  @ismonoidfun (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) f ×
  @ismonoidfun (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) f.

Definition make_isrigfun {X Y : rig} {f : X → Y}
           (H1 : @ismonoidfun (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) f)
           (H2 : @ismonoidfun (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) f) : isrigfun f :=
  H1 ,, H2.

Definition isrigfunisaddmonoidfun {X Y : rig} {f : X → Y} (H : isrigfun f) :
  @ismonoidfun (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) f := dirprod_pr1 H.

Definition isrigfunismultmonoidfun {X Y : rig} {f : X → Y} (H : isrigfun f) :
  @ismonoidfun (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) f := dirprod_pr2 H.


X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (isrigfun f)


X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (isrigfun f)

  
X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (ismonoidfun f)
X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (ismonoidfun f)

  
X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (ismonoidfun f)
 use isapropismonoidfun.
  
X, Y: rig
f: X → Y
isaprop (ismonoidfun f)
 use isapropismonoidfun.
Qed.

Definition rigfun (X Y : rig) : UU := ∑ (f : X → Y), isrigfun f.


X, Y: rig
isaset (rigfun X Y)


X, Y: rig
isaset (rigfun X Y)

  
X, Y: rig
isaset (X → Y)
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X → Y, isaset (isrigfun x)

  
X, Y: rig
isaset (X → Y)
 use isaset_set_fun_space.
  
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X → Y, isaset (isrigfun x)
 
X, Y: rig
x: X → Y
isaset (isrigfun x)
 
X, Y: rig
x: X → Y
isaprop (isrigfun x)
 use isapropisrigfun.
Qed.

Definition rigfunconstr {X Y : rig} {f : X → Y} (is : isrigfun f) : rigfun X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1rigfun (X Y : rig) : rigfun X Y → (X → Y) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1rigfun : rigfun >-> Funclass.

Definition rigaddfun {X Y : rig} (f : rigfun X Y) :
  monoidfun (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) := make_monoidfun (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition rigmultfun {X Y : rig} (f : rigfun X Y) :
  monoidfun (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) := make_monoidfun (pr2 (pr2 f)).

Definition rigfun_to_unel_rigaddmonoid {X Y : rig} (f : rigfun X Y) : f (0%rig) = 0%rig :=
  pr2 (pr1 (pr2 f)).


X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
rigfun X Z


X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
rigfun X Z

  
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
X → Z
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
isrigfun ?f

  
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
X → Z
 exact (g ∘ f).
  
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
isrigfun (g ∘ f)
 
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
ismonoidfun (g ∘ f)
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
ismonoidfun (g ∘ f)

    
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
ismonoidfun (g ∘ f)
 exact (ismonoidfun_monoidfun (monoidfuncomp (rigaddfun f) (rigaddfun g))).
    
X, Y, Z: rig
f: rigfun X Y
g: rigfun Y Z
ismonoidfun (g ∘ f)
 exact (ismonoidfun_monoidfun (monoidfuncomp (rigmultfun f) (rigmultfun g))).
Defined.


X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(f = g)%type


X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(f = g)%type

  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(transportf isrigfun ?p (pr2 f) = pr2 g)%type

  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
 exact e.
  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(transportf isrigfun e (pr2 f) = pr2 g)%type
 
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigfun X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
isaprop (isrigfun (pr1 g))
 use isapropisrigfun.
Qed.

Definition rigiso (X Y : rig) : UU := ∑ (f : X ≃ Y), isrigfun f.

Definition make_rigiso {X Y : rig} (f : X ≃ Y) (is : isrigfun f) : rigiso X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1rigiso (X Y : rig) : rigiso X Y → X ≃ Y := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1rigiso : rigiso >-> weq.

Definition rigisoisrigfun {X Y : rig} (f : rigiso X Y) : isrigfun f := pr2 f.

Definition rigaddiso {X Y : rig} (f : rigiso X Y) :
  monoidiso (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) :=
  @make_monoidiso (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid Y) (pr1 f) (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition rigmultiso {X Y : rig} (f : rigiso X Y) :
  monoidiso (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) :=
  @make_monoidiso (rigmultmonoid X) (rigmultmonoid Y) (pr1 f) (pr2 (pr2 f)).


X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(f = g)%type


X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(f = g)%type

  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(transportf (λ x : X ≃ Y, isrigfun x) ?p (pr2 f) =
 pr2 g)%type

  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
 exact e.
  
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
(transportf (λ x : X ≃ Y, isrigfun x) e (pr2 f) =
 pr2 g)%type
 
X, Y: rig
f, g: rigiso X Y
e: (pr1 f = pr1 g)%type
isaprop (isrigfun (pr1 g))
 use isapropisrigfun.
Qed.

Definition rigisotorigfun {X Y : rig} (f : rigiso X Y) : rigfun X Y := rigfunconstr (pr2 f).

f: rigiso X Y
isrigfun (invmap f)


X, Y: rig
f: rigiso X Y
isrigfun (invmap f)

f: rigiso X Y
isrigfun (invmap f)

f: rigiso X Y
ismonoidfun (invmap f)
X, Y: rig
f: rigiso X Y
ismonoidfun (invmap f)

f: rigiso X Y
ismonoidfun (invmap f)
 apply (ismonoidfuninvmap (rigaddiso f)).
  
X, Y: rig
f: rigiso X Y
ismonoidfun (invmap f)
 apply  (ismonoidfuninvmap (rigmultiso f)).
Defined.

Definition invrigiso {X Y : rig} (f : rigiso X Y) : rigiso Y X :=
  make_rigiso (invweq f) (isrigfuninvmap f).

(idweq X 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type

isbinopfun (idweq X)

∏ x x' : rigaddabmonoid X,
idweq X (x + x')%addmonoid =
(idweq X x + idweq X x')%addmonoid

(idweq X (x + x')%addmonoid =
 (idweq X x + idweq X x')%addmonoid)%type
 use idpath.

ismonoidfun (idweq X)

(idweq X 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type

isbinopfun (idweq X)

∏ x x' : rigmultmonoid X,
idweq X (x + x')%addmonoid =
(idweq X x + idweq X x')%addmonoid

(idweq X (x + x')%addmonoid =
 (idweq X x + idweq X x')%addmonoid)%type
 use idpath.
      
X: rig
(idweq X 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type
 use idpath.
Defined.


(** **** (X = Y) ≃ (rigiso X Y)
    We use the following composition

                              (X = Y) ≃ (X ╝ Y)
                                      ≃ (rigiso' X Y)
                                      ≃ (rigiso X Y)

    where the second weak equivalence is given by univalence for setwith2binop,
    [setwith2binop_univalence]. The reason to define rigiso' is that it allows us to use
    [setwith2binop_univalence].
*)

Local Definition rigiso' (X Y : rig) : UU :=
  ∑ D : (∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w),
        ((pr1 D) (@rigunel1 X) = @rigunel1 Y) × ((pr1 D) (@rigunel2 X) = @rigunel2 Y).

Local Definition make_rigiso' (X Y : rig) (w : X ≃ Y) (H1 : istwobinopfun w)
           (H2 : w (@rigunel1 X) = @rigunel1 Y) (H3 : w (@rigunel2 X) = @rigunel2 Y) :
  rigiso' X Y := (w ,, H1) ,, H2 ,, H3.

Definition rig_univalence_weq1 (X Y : rig) : (X = Y) ≃ (X ╝ Y) :=
  total2_paths_equiv _ _ _.


X, Y: rig
X ╝ Y ≃ rigiso' X Y


X, Y: rig
X ╝ Y ≃ rigiso' X Y

  
X, Y: rig
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w)
X, Y: rig
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : setwith2binop,
    (λ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) x1) x0
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : ∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w,
   (pr1 x0 0%rig = 0%rig)%logic
   × (pr1 x0 1%rig = 1%rig)%logic) (?w x)

  
X, Y: rig
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w)
 exact (setwith2binop_univalence X Y).
  
X, Y: rig
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : setwith2binop,
    (λ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) x1) x0
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : ∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w,
   (pr1 x0 0%rig = 0%rig)%logic
   × (pr1 x0 1%rig = 1%rig)%logic)
    (setwith2binop_univalence X Y x)
 
X, Y: rig
e: (pr1 X = pr1 Y)%type
(λ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : setwith2binop,
    (λ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) x0) x
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) e
≃ (λ x : ∑ w : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun w,
   (pr1 x 0%rig = 0%rig)%logic
   × (pr1 x 1%rig = 1%rig)%logic)
    (setwith2binop_univalence X Y e)
 
X, Y: rig
e: (pr1 X = pr1 Y)%type
transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
  (pr2 X) = pr2 Y
≃ pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 0%rig =
  0%rig
  × pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 1%rig =
    1%rig
 
X, Y: rig
e: (pr1 X = pr1 Y)%type
pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 0%rig = 0%rig
× pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 1%rig =
  1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
    (pr2 X) = pr2 Y
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop: isrigops op1 op2
Y: rig
e: (pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 Y)%type
pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) Y e) 0%rig =
0%rig
× pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) Y e)
    1%rig = 1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 Y
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop: isrigops op1 op2
Y: setwith2binop
Yop: isrigops op1 op2
e: (pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 (Y,, Yop))%type
pr1
  (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) (Y,, Yop) e)
  0%rig = 0%rig
× pr1
    (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) (Y,, Yop)
       e) 1%rig = 1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (Y,, Yop)
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop: isrigops op1 op2
Y: setwith2binop
Yop: isrigops op1 op2
e: (X = Y)%type
pr1
  (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) (Y,, Yop) e)
  0%rig = 0%rig
× pr1
    (setwith2binop_univalence_map (X,, Xop) (Y,, Yop)
       e) 1%rig = 1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (Y,, Yop)

    
X: setwith2binop
Xop: isrigops op1 op2
Y: setwith2binop
Yop: isrigops op1 op2
e: (X = Y)%type
pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 0%rig = 0%rig
× pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e) 1%rig =
  1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2) e
    Xop = Yop
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
  0%rig = 0%rig
× pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
    1%rig = 1%rig
≃ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
    (idpath X) Xop = Yop
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
(pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
   0%rig = 0%rig)%type
× (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     1%rig = 1%rig)%type
→ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
    (idpath X) Xop = Yop
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
  (idpath X) Xop = Yop
→ (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     0%rig = 0%rig)%type
  × (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
       1%rig = 1%rig)%type
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
isaprop
  ((pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
      0%rig = 0%rig)%type
   × (pr1
        (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
        1%rig = 1%rig)%type)
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
     (idpath X) Xop = Yop)%type

    
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
(pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
   0%rig = 0%rig)%type
× (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     1%rig = 1%rig)%type
→ transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
    (idpath X) Xop = Yop
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
i: (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
   0%rig = 0%rig)%type
× (pr1
     (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     1%rig = 1%rig)%type
(transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
   (idpath X) Xop = Yop)%type
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
i: (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
   0%rig = 0%rig)%type
× (pr1
     (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     1%rig = 1%rig)%type
isaprop (isrigops op1 op2)
 use isapropisrigops.
    
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
  (idpath X) Xop = Yop
→ (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     0%rig = 0%rig)%type
  × (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
       1%rig = 1%rig)%type
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
i: (transportf
   (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
   (idpath X) Xop = Yop)%type
(pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
   0%rig = 0%rig)%type
× (pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
     1%rig = 1%rig)%type
 now induction i.
    
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
isaprop
  ((pr1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
      0%rig = 0%rig)%type
   × (pr1
        (setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X))
        1%rig = 1%rig)%type)

     1%rig = 1%rig)%type

X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2

     (idpath X) Xop = Yop)%type
 
X: setwith2binop
Xop, Yop: isrigops op1 op2
iscontr
  (transportf (λ x : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2)
     (idpath X) Xop = Yop)%type
 exact (@isapropisrigops X op1 op2 Xop Yop).
Defined.
Opaque rig_univalence_weq2.

rigiso' X Y ≃ rigiso X Y

rigiso' X Y ≃ rigiso X Y

∏ x x' : rigaddabmonoid X,
(pr11 i') (x + x')%addmonoid =

           exact (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 (pr1 i'))).

 exact (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')).

∏ x x' : rigmultmonoid X,

((pr11 i') x + (pr11 i') x')%addmonoid

           exact (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 (pr1 i'))).
        
X, Y: rig
i': rigiso' X Y
((pr11 i') 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i')).
  
X, Y: rig
isweq
  (λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
   make_rigiso (pr11 i')
     (make_isrigfun
        (make_ismonoidfun
           (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
           (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
        (make_ismonoidfun
           (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
           (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i')))))
 
X, Y: rig
rigiso X Y → rigiso' X Y
X, Y: rig
∏ x : rigiso' X Y,
?g
  ((λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
    make_rigiso (pr11 i')
      (make_isrigfun
         (make_ismonoidfun
            (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
            (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
         (make_ismonoidfun
            (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
            (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i'))))) x) = x
X, Y: rig
∏ y : rigiso X Y,
(λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
 make_rigiso (pr11 i')
   (make_isrigfun
      (make_ismonoidfun
         (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
         (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
      (make_ismonoidfun
         (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
         (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i'))))) (?g y) = y

X ≃ Y

istwobinopfun ?w

(?w 0%rig = 0%rig)%type

(?w 1%rig = 1%rig)%type

i: rigiso X Y
X ≃ Y
 exact (pr1rigiso _ _ i).

i: rigiso X Y
∏ x x' : X, i (x + x')%rig = (i x + i x')%rig

i: rigiso X Y
∏ x x' : X, i (x * x')%rig = (i x * i x')%rig

i: rigiso X Y
∏ x x' : X, i (x + x')%rig = (i x + i x')%rig
 exact (ismonoidfunisbinopfun (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))).
        
X, Y: rig
i: rigiso X Y
∏ x x' : X, i (x * x')%rig = (i x * i x')%rig
 exact (ismonoidfunisbinopfun (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))).

i: rigiso X Y
(i 0%rig = 0%rig)%type
 exact (ismonoidfununel (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))).
      
X, Y: rig
i: rigiso X Y
(i 1%rig = 1%rig)%type
 exact (ismonoidfununel (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))).
    
X, Y: rig
∏ x : rigiso' X Y,
(λ i : rigiso X Y,
 make_rigiso' X Y i
   (make_istwobinopfun i
      (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
         (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
      (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
         (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
   (ismonoidfununel
      (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
   (ismonoidfununel
      (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
  ((λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
    make_rigiso (pr11 i')
      (make_isrigfun
         (make_ismonoidfun
            (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
            (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
         (make_ismonoidfun
            (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
            (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i'))))) x) = x
 
X, Y: rig
x: rigiso' X Y
((λ i : rigiso X Y,
  make_rigiso' X Y i
    (make_istwobinopfun i
       (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
          (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
       (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
          (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
    (ismonoidfununel
       (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
    (ismonoidfununel
       (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
   ((λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
     make_rigiso (pr11 i')
       (make_isrigfun
          (make_ismonoidfun
             (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
             (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
          (make_ismonoidfun
             (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
             (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i'))))) x) = x)%type
 use idpath.
    
X, Y: rig
∏ y : rigiso X Y,
(λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
 make_rigiso (pr11 i')
   (make_isrigfun
      (make_ismonoidfun
         (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
         (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
      (make_ismonoidfun
         (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
         (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i')))))
  ((λ i : rigiso X Y,
    make_rigiso' X Y i
      (make_istwobinopfun i
         (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
            (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
         (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
            (isrigfunismultmonoidfun
               (rigisoisrigfun i))))
      (ismonoidfununel
         (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
      (ismonoidfununel
         (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
     y) = y
 
X, Y: rig
x: rigiso X Y
((λ i' : rigiso' X Y,
  make_rigiso (pr11 i')
    (make_isrigfun
       (make_ismonoidfun
          (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 i')))
          (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 i')))
       (make_ismonoidfun
          (make_isbinopfun (dirprod_pr2 (pr21 i')))
          (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 i')))))
   ((λ i : rigiso X Y,
     make_rigiso' X Y i
       (make_istwobinopfun i
          (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
             (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun
                (rigisoisrigfun i)))
          (ismonoidfunisbinopfun
             (isrigfunismultmonoidfun
                (rigisoisrigfun i))))
       (ismonoidfununel
          (isrigfunisaddmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i)))
       (ismonoidfununel
          (isrigfunismultmonoidfun (rigisoisrigfun i))))
      x) = x)%type
 use idpath.
Defined.
Opaque rig_univalence_weq3.

X = Y → rigiso X Y

 exact (idrigiso X).

isweq (rig_univlalence_map X Y)


X, Y: rig
isweq (rig_univlalence_map X Y)

  
X, Y: rig
X = Y → rigiso X Y
X, Y: rig
homotsec ?f1 (rig_univlalence_map X Y)
X, Y: rig
isweq ?f1

  
X, Y: rig
X = Y → rigiso X Y
 exact (weqcomp (rig_univalence_weq1 X Y)
                   (weqcomp (rig_univalence_weq2 X Y) (rig_univalence_weq3 X Y))).
  
X, Y: rig
homotsec
  (rig_univalence_weq3 X Y ∘ rig_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ rig_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
  (rig_univlalence_map X Y)
 
X, Y: rig
e: (X = Y)%type
((rig_univalence_weq3 X Y ∘ rig_univalence_weq2 X Y
  ∘ rig_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq e =
 rig_univlalence_map X Y e)%type
 
X: rig
((rig_univalence_weq3 X X ∘ rig_univalence_weq2 X X
  ∘ rig_univalence_weq1 X X)%weq (idpath X) =
 rig_univlalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    
X: rig
((rig_univalence_weq3 X X ∘ rig_univalence_weq2 X X)%weq
   (rig_univalence_weq1 X X (idpath X)) =
 rig_univlalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    exact weqcomp_to_funcomp_app.
  
X, Y: rig
isweq
  (rig_univalence_weq3 X Y ∘ rig_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ rig_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
 use weqproperty.
Defined.
Opaque rig_univalence_isweq.

Definition rig_univalence (X Y : rig) : (X = Y) ≃ (rigiso X Y)
  := make_weq
    (rig_univlalence_map X Y)
    (rig_univalence_isweq X Y).


(** **** Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal" on rigs *)

Definition isrigmultgt (X : rig) (R : hrel X) :=
  ∏ (a b c d : X), R a b → R c d → R (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b d)) (op1 (op2 a d) (op2 b c)).

Definition isinvrigmultgt (X : rig) (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (∏ (a b c d : X), R (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b d)) (op1 (op2 a d) (op2 b c)) → R a b → R c d) ×
  (∏ (a b c d : X), R (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b d)) (op1 (op2 a d) (op2 b c)) → R c d → R a b).


(** **** Subobjects *)

Definition issubrig {X : rig} (A : hsubtype X) : UU :=
  (@issubmonoid (rigaddabmonoid X) A) × (@issubmonoid (rigmultmonoid X) A).


X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubrig A)


X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubrig A)

  
X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubrig A)
 
X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (issubmonoid A)
X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (issubmonoid A)

  
X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (issubmonoid A)
 apply isapropissubmonoid.
  
X: rig
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (issubmonoid A)
 apply isapropissubmonoid.
Defined.

Definition subrig (X : rig) : UU := ∑ ( A : hsubtype X), issubrig A.

Definition make_subrig {X : rig}
  (t : hsubtype X)
  (H : issubrig t)
  : subrig X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1subrig (X : rig) : @subrig X → hsubtype X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ  A : hsubtype X, issubrig A).

Definition subrigtosubsetswith2binop (X : rig) : subrig X → @subsetswith2binop X :=
  λ A, make_subsetswith2binop (pr1 A) (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) ,, pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A))).
Coercion subrigtosubsetswith2binop : subrig >-> subsetswith2binop.

Definition rigaddsubmonoid {X : rig} : subrig X → @subabmonoid (rigaddabmonoid X) :=
  λ A, @make_submonoid (rigaddabmonoid X) (pr1 A) (pr1 (pr2 A)).

Definition rigmultsubmonoid {X : rig} : subrig X → @submonoid (rigmultmonoid X) :=
  λ A, @make_submonoid (rigmultmonoid X) (pr1 A) (pr2 (pr2 A)).


X: rig
A: subrig X
isrigops op1 op2

A: subrig X
isrigops op1 op2

A: subrig X
isrigops op1 op2

(∏ x : A,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : A,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))

A: subrig X
isdistr op1 op2

 (unel_is

      ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A)))

X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
((unel_is
    (pr1
       (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,

X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
(pr1carrier A
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
          ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A))) * a)%rig =
 pr1carrier A
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
          ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A)))))%type

        
X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
((0%addmonoid * pr1carrier (pr1 A) a)%rig =
 0%addmonoid)%type
 apply rigmult0x.
      
X: rig
A: subrig X
∏ x : A,
(x *
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
       ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A))))%rig =
unel_is
  (pr1
     (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
      ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A)))
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
((a *
  unel_is
    (pr1
       (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
        ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A))))%rig =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
       ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A))))%type
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
(pr1carrier A
   (a *
    unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
          ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A))))%rig =
 pr1carrier A
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidcarrier (rigaddsubmonoid A),,
          ismonoidcarrier (rigmultsubmonoid A)))))%type

        
X: rig
A: subrig X
a: A
((pr1carrier (pr1 A) a * 0%addmonoid)%rig =
 0%addmonoid)%type
 apply rigmultx0.
  
X: rig
A: subrig X
isdistr op1 op2
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
isldistr op1 op2
X: rig
A: subrig X
isrdistr op1 op2

    
X: rig
A: subrig X
isldistr op1 op2
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
((c * (a + b))%rig = (c * a + c * b)%rig)%type
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
(pr1carrier A (c * (a + b))%rig =
 pr1carrier A (c * a + c * b)%rig)%type

      
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
((pr1carrier (pr1 A) c *
  (pr1carrier (pr1 A) a + pr1carrier (pr1 A) b))%rig =
 (pr1carrier (pr1 A) c * pr1carrier (pr1 A) a +
  pr1carrier (pr1 A) c * pr1carrier (pr1 A) b)%rig)%type
 apply rigldistr.
    
X: rig
A: subrig X
isrdistr op1 op2
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
(((a + b) * c)%rig = (a * c + b * c)%rig)%type
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
(pr1carrier A ((a + b) * c)%rig =
 pr1carrier A (a * c + b * c)%rig)%type

      
X: rig
A: subrig X
a, b, c: A
(((pr1carrier (pr1 A) a + pr1carrier (pr1 A) b) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 A) c)%rig =
 (pr1carrier (pr1 A) a * pr1carrier (pr1 A) c +
  pr1carrier (pr1 A) b * pr1carrier (pr1 A) c)%rig)%type
 apply rigrdistr.
Defined.


X: rig
A: subrig X
rig


X: rig
A: subrig X
rig
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
rig
 
X: rig
A: subrig X
isrigops op1 op2
 apply isrigcarrier. Defined.
Coercion carrierofasubrig : subrig >-> rig.

(** **** Quotient objects *)

Definition rigeqrel {X : rig} : UU := @twobinopeqrel X.
Identity Coercion id_rigeqrel : rigeqrel >-> twobinopeqrel.

Definition addabmonoideqrel {X : rig} (R : @rigeqrel X) :
  @binopeqrel (rigaddabmonoid X) := @make_binopeqrel (rigaddabmonoid X) (pr1 R) (pr1 (pr2 R)).

Definition multmonoideqrel {X : rig} (R : @rigeqrel X) :
  @binopeqrel (rigmultmonoid X) := @make_binopeqrel (rigmultmonoid X) (pr1 R) (pr2 (pr2 R)).


X: rig
R: rigeqrel
isrigops op1 op2


X: rig
R: rigeqrel
isrigops op1 op2

  
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
isrigops op1 op2
 
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
isdistr op1 op2

  
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 (unel_is
    (pr1
       (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
        ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))) * x)%rig =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
       ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   (x *
    unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
          ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))%rig =
   unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
         ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))

    
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 (unel_is
    (pr1
       (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
        ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))) * x)%rig =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
       ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   (x *
    unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
          ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))%rig =
   unel_is
     (pr1

         ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))

    
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 opp2
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
          ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R)))) x =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
       ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   opp2 x
     (unel_is
        (pr1
           (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
            ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R)))) =
   unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
         ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))

    
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
zr:= setquotpr R 0%rig: setquot R
(∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
 opp2
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
          ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R)))) x =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidquot (addabmonoideqrel R),,
       ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R))))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
   opp2 x

  (unel_is

zr:= setquotpr R 0%rig: setquot R
∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,

X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
zr:= setquotpr R 0%rig: setquot R
∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp (opp2 zr (setquotpr R x) = zr)%type
     (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
        (opp2 zr (setquotpr R x)) zr))

      
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
zr:= setquotpr R 0%rig: setquot R
x: X
pr1
  (make_hProp (opp2 zr (setquotpr R x) = zr)%type
     (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
        (opp2 zr (setquotpr R x)) zr))
 apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (rigmult0x X x)).

R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
zr:= setquotpr R 0%rig: setquot R
∏ x : setwith2binopquot R,
opp2 x

     (pr1

         ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R)))) =
unel_is

      ismonoidquot (multmonoideqrel R)))

∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp (opp2 (setquotpr R x) zr = zr)%type
     (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
        (opp2 (setquotpr R x) zr) zr))

        (opp2 (setquotpr R x) zr) zr))
 apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (rigmultx0 X x)).

isdistr op1 op2

opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)

X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
∏ x x' x'' : setwith2binopquot R,
opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') = opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x')

      
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
∏ x x' x'' : X,
make_hProp
  (opp2 (setquotpr R x'')
     (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')) =
   opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x))
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x')))%type
  (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x'')
        (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')))
     (opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x))
        (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x'))))

      
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
x, x', x'': X
make_hProp
  (opp2 (setquotpr R x'')
     (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')) =
   opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x))
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x')))%type
  (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x'')
        (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')))
     (opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x))
        (opp2 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x'))))
 apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (rigldistr X x x' x'')).
    
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
isrdistr opp1 opp2
 
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
∏ x x' x'' : setwith2binopquot R,
opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' = opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x'')

      
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
∏ x x' x'' : X,
make_hProp
  (opp2 (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
     (setquotpr R x'') =
   opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')))%type
  (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
     (opp2 (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
        (setquotpr R x''))
     (opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
        (opp2 (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x''))))

      
X: rig
R: rigeqrel
opp1:= op1: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
opp2:= op2: binop (setwith2binopquot R)
x, x', x'': X
make_hProp
  (opp2 (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
     (setquotpr R x'') =
   opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
     (opp2 (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')))%type
  (setproperty (setwith2binopquot R)
     (opp2 (opp1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
        (setquotpr R x''))
     (opp1 (opp2 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
        (opp2 (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x''))))
 apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (rigrdistr X x x' x'')).
Defined.

Definition rigquot {X : rig} (R : @rigeqrel X) : rig :=
  @make_rig (setwith2binopquot R) (isrigquot R).


(** **** Direct products *)


X, Y: rig
isrigops op1 op2


X, Y: rig
isrigops op1 op2

  
X, Y: rig
isrigops op1 op2
 
X, Y: rig
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
X, Y: rig
isdistr op1 op2

  
X, Y: rig
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
X, Y: rig
(∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
 (unel_is
    (pr1
       (isabmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
          (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
        ismonoiddirprod (rigmultmonoid X)
          (rigmultmonoid Y))) * x)%rig =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
       ismonoiddirprod (rigmultmonoid X)
         (rigmultmonoid Y))))
× (∏ x : setwith2binopdirprod X Y,
   (x *
    unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
            (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
          ismonoiddirprod (rigmultmonoid X)
            (rigmultmonoid Y))))%rig =
   unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
           (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
         ismonoiddirprod (rigmultmonoid X)
           (rigmultmonoid Y))))

    
X, Y: rig
(∏ x : X × Y,
 (unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * x)%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))
× (∏ x : X × Y,
   (x *
    unel_is
      (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
   unel_is
     (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
        (rigaddabmonoid Y)))
 
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X × Y,
(unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * x)%rig =
unel_is
  (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
     (rigaddabmonoid Y))
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X × Y,
(x *
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
unel_is
  (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
     (rigaddabmonoid Y))

    
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X × Y,
(unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * x)%rig =
unel_is
  (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
     (rigaddabmonoid Y))
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * xy)%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * xy)%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)) * xy)%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   (unel_is
      (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y))) xy =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   (unel_is
      (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
       (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
       isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y))) xy =
 unel_is
   (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
    (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
    isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   (pr12 (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
            (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
          (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
          isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
            (rigaddabmonoid Y))) xy =
 pr12 (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
       (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
       isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 X) 0%addmonoid (pr1 xy),,
 (pr22 Y) 0%addmonoid (pr2 xy) =
 0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 X) 0%addmonoid (pr1 xy) = 0%addmonoid)%type
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 Y) 0%addmonoid (pr2 xy) = 0%addmonoid)%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 Y) 0%addmonoid (pr2 xy) = 0%addmonoid)%type
 apply (rigmult0x Y).
    
X, Y: rig
∏ x : X × Y,
(x *
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
unel_is
  (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
     (rigaddabmonoid Y))
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((xy *
  unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((xy *
  unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((xy *
  unel_is
    (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
       (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%rig =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy
   (unel_is
      (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y))) =
 unel_is
   (ismonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy
   (unel_is
      (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
       (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
       isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y))) =
 unel_is
   (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
    (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
    isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy
   (pr12 (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
            (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
          (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
          isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
            (rigaddabmonoid Y))) =
 pr12 (isassocdirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y),,
       (0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid),,
       isunitindirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid Y)))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 X) (pr1 xy) 0%addmonoid,,
 (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) 0%addmonoid =
 0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 X) (pr1 xy) 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy: X × Y
((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) 0%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)%type
 apply (rigmultx0 Y).
  
X, Y: rig
isdistr op1 op2
 
X, Y: rig
isldistr op1 op2
X, Y: rig
isrdistr op1 op2

    
X, Y: rig
isldistr op1 op2
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((xy'' * (xy + xy'))%rig =
 (xy'' * xy + xy'' * xy')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((xy'' * (xy + xy'))%rig =
 (xy'' * xy + xy'' * xy')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((xy'' *
  (pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
         (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
          (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
          (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
         (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
          pr1 xy * pr1 xy',, pr2 xy * pr2 xy'))) xy
    xy')%rig =
 (pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr1 xy * pr1 xy')%rig,,
         (pr2 xy * pr2 xy')%rig))) (xy'' * xy)%rig
   (xy'' * xy')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy''
   ((pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy xy') =
 (pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   ((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy'' xy)
   ((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy'' xy'))%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') ((pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')),,
 (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) =
 (pr12 X) ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') (pr1 xy))
   ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') (pr1 xy')),,
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy')))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') ((pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')) =
 (pr12 X) ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') (pr1 xy))
   ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy'') (pr1 xy')))%type
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) =
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy')))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) =
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy'') (pr2 xy')))%type
 apply (rigldistr Y).
    
X, Y: rig
isrdistr op1 op2
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
(((xy + xy') * xy'')%rig =
 (xy * xy'' + xy' * xy'')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
(((xy + xy') * xy'')%rig =
 (xy * xy'' + xy' * xy'')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
(((pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
         (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
          (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
          (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
         (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
          pr1 xy * pr1 xy',, pr2 xy * pr2 xy'))) xy
    xy' * xy'')%rig =
 (pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr1 xy * pr1 xy')%rig,,
         (pr2 xy * pr2 xy')%rig))) (xy * xy'')%rig
   (xy' * xy'')%rig)%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   ((pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy xy')
   xy'' =
 (pr12 (setdirprod X Y,,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
        (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
         (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
         (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))))
   ((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy xy'')
   ((pr22 (setdirprod X Y,,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),,
           (λ xy xy' : ∑ _ : X, Y,
            (pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'),,
            (pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))) xy' xy''))%type

      
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 X) ((pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')) (pr1 xy''),,
 (pr22 Y) ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) (pr2 xy'') =
 (pr12 X) ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy''))
   ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy') (pr1 xy'')),,
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy''))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy') (pr2 xy'')))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 X) ((pr12 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')) (pr1 xy'') =
 (pr12 X) ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy''))
   ((pr22 X) (pr1 xy') (pr1 xy'')))%type
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 Y) ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) (pr2 xy'') =
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy''))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy') (pr2 xy'')))%type
 
X, Y: rig
xy, xy', xy'': setwith2binopdirprod X Y
((pr22 Y) ((pr12 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')) (pr2 xy'') =
 (pr12 Y) ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy''))
   ((pr22 Y) (pr2 xy') (pr2 xy'')))%type
 apply (rigrdistr Y).
Defined.

Definition rigdirprod (X Y : rig) : rig := @make_rig (setwith2binopdirprod X Y) (isrigdirprod X Y).

(** **** Opposite rigs *)

Local Open Scope rig.

(** Following Bourbaki's Algebra, I, §8.3, Example V *)

X: rig
rig


X: rig
rig


  (* Use the same underlying set and addition, flip the multiplication *)
  
X: rig
isrigops op1 op2


  
X: rig
isrigops op1 (λ x y : X, y * x)

  
X: rig
ismonoidop (λ x y : X, y * x)
X: rig
∏ x : X,
x * unel_is (rigop1axs X) = unel_is (rigop1axs X)
X: rig
∏ x : X,
unel_is (rigop1axs X) * x = unel_is (rigop1axs X)
X: rig
isdistr op1 (λ x y : X, y * x)


  (* For these proofs, we just have to switch some arguments around *)
  
X: rig
ismonoidop (λ x y : X, y * x)
 
X: rig
isassoc (λ x y : X, y * x)
X: rig
isunital (λ x y : X, y * x)

    
X: rig
isassoc (λ x y : X, y * x)
 exact (λ x y z, !rigassoc2 _ z y x).
    
X: rig
isunital (λ x y : X, y * x)
 
X: rig
isunit (λ x y : X, y * x) 1

      exact (rigrunax2 _ ,, riglunax2 _).
  
X: rig
∏ x : X,
x * unel_is (rigop1axs X) = unel_is (rigop1axs X)
 exact (rigmultx0 _).
  
X: rig
∏ x : X,
unel_is (rigop1axs X) * x = unel_is (rigop1axs X)
 exact (rigmult0x _).
  
X: rig
isdistr op1 (λ x y : X, y * x)
 exact (rigrdistr _ ,, rigldistr _).
Defined.

(** In Emacs, use the function insert-char and choose SUPERSCRIPT ZERO *)
Notation "X ⁰" := (opposite_rig X) (at level 12) : rig_scope.


X: rig
rigiso X ((X ⁰) ⁰)


X: rig
rigiso X ((X ⁰) ⁰)

  
X: rig
isrigfun (idfun X,, idisweq X)

  repeat split.
Defined.

(** **** Nonzero rigs *)


X: rig
hProp


X: rig
hProp

  
X: rig
UU
X: rig
isaprop ?X

  
X: rig
UU
 exact ((1 : X) != 0).
  
X: rig
isaprop ((1 : X) != 0)
 apply isapropneg.
Defined.

Local Close Scope rig.

(** *** Commutative rigs *)

(** **** General definitions *)

Definition commrig : UU := ∑ (X : setwith2binop), iscommrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X).

Definition make_commrig (X : setwith2binop) (is : iscommrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) : commrig :=
  X ,, is.


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
commrig


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
commrig

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
commrig
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
iscommrigops op1 op2

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isrigops op1 op2
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
iscomm op2

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isrigops op1 op2
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isdistr op1 op2

    
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%rig = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
(∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
 (unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)) * x)%rig =
 unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)))
× (∏ x : make_setwith2binop X (opp1,, opp2),
   (x * unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)))%rig =
   unel_is (pr1 ((ax11,, ax12),, ax2)))

      apply (m0x ,, mx0).
    
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
isdistr op1 op2
 apply dax.
  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
ax11: ismonoidop opp1
ax12: iscomm opp1
ax2: ismonoidop opp2
ax22: iscomm opp2
m0x: ∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is ax11) x = unel_is ax11
mx0: ∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is ax11) = unel_is ax11
dax: isdistr opp1 opp2
iscomm op2
 apply ax22.
Defined.

Definition commrigtorig : commrig → rig := λ X, @make_rig (pr1 X) (pr1 (pr2 X)).
Coercion commrigtorig : commrig >-> rig.

Definition rigcomm2 (X : commrig) : iscomm (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 X).

Definition commrigop2axs (X : commrig) : isabmonoidop (@op2 X) :=
  rigop2axs X ,, rigcomm2 X.

Definition commrigmultabmonoid (X : commrig) : abmonoid :=
  make_abmonoid (make_setwithbinop X op2) (rigop2axs X ,, rigcomm2 X).


(** **** (X = Y) ≃ (rigiso X Y)
    We use the following composition

                          (X = Y) ≃ (make_commrig' X = make_commrig' Y)
                                  ≃ ((pr1 (make_commrig' X)) = (pr1 (make_commrig' Y)))
                                  ≃ (rigiso X Y)

    where the third weak equivalence uses univalence for rigs, [rig_univalence]. We define
    [commrig'] to be able to apply it.
 *)

Local Definition commrig' : UU :=
  ∑ D : (∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)), iscomm (@op2 (pr1 D)).

Local Definition make_commrig' (CR : commrig) : commrig' :=
  (pr1 CR ,, dirprod_pr1 (pr2 CR)) ,, (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 CR)).

Definition commrig_univalence_weq1 : commrig ≃ commrig' :=
  weqtotal2asstol
    (λ X : setwith2binop, isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X))
    (λ y : (∑ (X : setwith2binop), isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)), iscomm (@op2 (pr1 y))).

Definition commrig_univalence_weq1' (X Y : commrig) : (X = Y) ≃ (make_commrig' X = make_commrig' Y) :=
  make_weq _ (@isweqmaponpaths commrig commrig' commrig_univalence_weq1 X Y).


X, Y: commrig
make_commrig' X = make_commrig' Y
≃ pr1 (make_commrig' X) = pr1 (make_commrig' Y)


X, Y: commrig
make_commrig' X = make_commrig' Y
≃ pr1 (make_commrig' X) = pr1 (make_commrig' Y)

  
X, Y: commrig
isPredicate
  (λ D : ∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2,
   iscomm op2)

  
X, Y: commrig
w: ∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2
isaprop (iscomm op2)
 use isapropiscomm.
Defined.
Opaque commrig_univalence_weq2.

Definition commrig_univalence_weq3 (X Y : commrig) :
  ((pr1 (make_commrig' X)) = (pr1 (make_commrig' Y))) ≃ (rigiso X Y) :=
  rig_univalence (pr1 (make_commrig' X)) (pr1 (make_commrig' Y)).


X, Y: commrig
X = Y → rigiso X Y


X, Y: commrig
X = Y → rigiso X Y

  
X, Y: commrig
e: (X = Y)%type
rigiso X Y
 
X: commrig
rigiso X X
 exact (idrigiso X).
Defined.


X, Y: commrig
isweq (commrig_univalence_map X Y)


X, Y: commrig
isweq (commrig_univalence_map X Y)

  
X, Y: commrig
X = Y → rigiso X Y
X, Y: commrig
homotsec ?f1 (commrig_univalence_map X Y)
X, Y: commrig
isweq ?f1

  
X, Y: commrig
X = Y → rigiso X Y
 exact (weqcomp (commrig_univalence_weq1' X Y)
                   (weqcomp (commrig_univalence_weq2 X Y) (commrig_univalence_weq3 X Y))).
  
X, Y: commrig
homotsec
  (commrig_univalence_weq3 X Y
   ∘ commrig_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ commrig_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq
  (commrig_univalence_map X Y)
 
X, Y: commrig
e: (X = Y)%type
((commrig_univalence_weq3 X Y
  ∘ commrig_univalence_weq2 X Y
  ∘ commrig_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq e =
 commrig_univalence_map X Y e)%type
 
X: commrig
((commrig_univalence_weq3 X X
  ∘ commrig_univalence_weq2 X X
  ∘ commrig_univalence_weq1' X X)%weq (idpath X) =
 commrig_univalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    
X: commrig
((commrig_univalence_weq3 X X
  ∘ commrig_univalence_weq2 X X)%weq
   (commrig_univalence_weq1' X X (idpath X)) =
 commrig_univalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    exact weqcomp_to_funcomp_app.
  
X, Y: commrig
isweq
  (commrig_univalence_weq3 X Y
   ∘ commrig_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ commrig_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq
 use weqproperty.
Defined.
Opaque commrig_univalence_isweq.

Definition commrig_univalence (X Y : commrig) : (X = Y) ≃ (rigiso X Y)
  := make_weq
  (commrig_univalence_map X Y)
  (commrig_univalence_isweq X Y).


(** **** Relations similar to "greater" on commutative rigs *)


X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
isinvrigmultgt X R

R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
isinvrigmultgt X R

  
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
isinvrigmultgt X R
 
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
∏ a b c d : X,
R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig
→ R a b → R c d
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
∏ a b c d : X,
R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig
→ R c d → R a b

  
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
∏ a b c d : X,
R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig
→ R a b → R c d
 apply is2.
  
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
∏ a b c d : X,
R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig
→ R c d → R a b

r: R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig
rcd: R c d
R a b

r: R (a * c + b * d)%rig (b * c + a * d)%rig
rcd: R c d
R a b

is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d

r: R (c * a + b * d)%rig (b * c + a * d)%rig
rcd: R c d

is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d

r: R (c * a + d * b)%rig (b * c + a * d)%rig
rcd: R c d
R a b

    
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
a, b, c, d: X
r: R (c * a + d * b)%rig (c * b + a * d)%rig
rcd: R c d
R a b

    
X: commrig
R: hrel X
is2: ∏ a b c d : X, R (a * c + b * d)%rig (a * d + b * c)%rig → R a b → R c d
a, b, c, d: X
r: R (c * a + d * b)%rig (c * b + d * a)%rig
rcd: R c d
R a b

    apply (is2 _ _ _ _ r rcd).
Defined.


(** **** Subobjects *)


X: commrig
A: subrig X
iscommrigops op1 op2


X: commrig
A: subrig X
iscommrigops op1 op2

  
X: commrig
A: subrig X
iscommrigops op1 op2
 
X: commrig
A: subrig X
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (@isabmonoidcarrier (commrigmultabmonoid X) (rigmultsubmonoid A))).
Defined.

(* ??? slows down at the last [ apply ] and at [ Defined ] (oct.16.2011 - does
  not slow down anymore with two Dan's patches) *)

Definition carrierofasubcommrig {X : commrig} (A : @subrig X) : commrig :=
  make_commrig A (iscommrigcarrier A).


(** **** Quotient objects *)


X: commrig
R: rigeqrel
iscommrigops op1 op2


X: commrig
R: rigeqrel
iscommrigops op1 op2

  
X: commrig
R: rigeqrel
iscommrigops op1 op2
 
X: commrig
R: rigeqrel
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (@isabmonoidquot  (commrigmultabmonoid X) (multmonoideqrel R))).
Defined.

Definition commrigquot {X : commrig} (R : @rigeqrel X) : commrig :=
  make_commrig (setwith2binopquot R) (iscommrigquot R).


(** **** Direct products *)


X, Y: commrig
iscommrigops op1 op2


X, Y: commrig
iscommrigops op1 op2

  
X, Y: commrig
iscommrigops op1 op2
 
X, Y: commrig
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (isabmonoiddirprod (commrigmultabmonoid X) (commrigmultabmonoid Y))).
Defined.

Definition commrigdirprod (X Y : commrig) : commrig :=
  make_commrig (setwith2binopdirprod X Y) (iscommrigdirprod X Y).

(** **** Opposite commutative rigs *)

Local Open Scope rig.

(** We reuse much of the proof for general rigs *)
Definition opposite_commrig (X : commrig) : commrig :=
  (pr1 (X⁰),, (pr2 (X⁰) ,, λ x y, rigcomm2 X y x)).

(** Commutativity makes taking the opposite trivial *)

X: commrig
rigiso X (opposite_commrig X)


X: commrig
rigiso X (opposite_commrig X)

  
X: commrig
isrigfun (idfun X,, idisweq X)

  
X: commrig
isbinopfun (idfun X,, idisweq X)

  
X: commrig
∏ x x' : rigmultmonoid X,
(idfun X,, idisweq X) (x + x')%addmonoid =
((idfun X,, idisweq X) x + (idfun X,, idisweq X) x')%addmonoid

  exact (λ x y, rigcomm2 X x y).
Defined.

Local Close Scope rig.


(** *** Rings *)


(** **** General definitions *)

Definition ring : UU := ∑ (X : setwith2binop), isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X).

Definition make_ring {X : setwith2binop} (is : isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) : ring :=
  X ,, is.

Definition pr1ring : ring → setwith2binop :=
  @pr1 _ (λ X : setwith2binop, isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)).
Coercion pr1ring : ring >-> setwith2binop.

Definition ringaxs (X : ring) : isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 X.

Definition ringop1axs (X : ring) : isabgrop (@op1 X) := pr1 (pr1 (pr2 X)).

Definition ringassoc1 (X : ring) : isassoc (@op1 X) := assocax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringunel1 {X : ring} : X := unel_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringlunax1 (X : ring) : islunit op1 (@ringunel1 X) := lunax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringrunax1 (X : ring) : isrunit op1 (@ringunel1 X) := runax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringinv1 {X : ring} : X → X := grinv_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringlinvax1 (X : ring) : ∏ x : X, op1 (ringinv1 x) x = ringunel1 :=
  grlinvax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringrinvax1 (X : ring) : ∏ x : X, op1 x (ringinv1 x) = ringunel1 :=
  grrinvax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringcomm1 (X : ring) : iscomm (@op1 X) := commax_is (ringop1axs X).

Definition ringop2axs (X : ring) : ismonoidop (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr1 (pr2 X)).

Definition ringassoc2 (X : ring) : isassoc (@op2 X) := assocax_is (ringop2axs X).

Definition ringunel2 {X : ring} : X := unel_is (ringop2axs X).

Definition ringlunax2 (X : ring) : islunit op2 (@ringunel2 X) := lunax_is (ringop2axs X).

Definition ringrunax2 (X : ring) : isrunit op2 (@ringunel2 X) := runax_is (ringop2axs X).

Definition ringdistraxs (X : ring) : isdistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 X).

Definition ringldistr (X : ring) : isldistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 X)).

Definition ringrdistr (X : ring) : isrdistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 X)).

Definition ringconstr {X : hSet} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) (ax11 : isgrop opp1) (ax12 : iscomm opp1)
           (ax2 : ismonoidop opp2) (dax : isdistr opp1 opp2) : ring :=
  @make_ring (make_setwith2binop X (opp1 ,, opp2))
           (((ax11 ,, ax12) ,, ax2) ,, dax).

Definition ringmultx0 (X : ring) : ∏ x : X, (op2 x ringunel1) = ringunel1 :=
  ringmultx0_is (ringaxs X).

Definition ringmult0x (X : ring) : ∏ x : X, (op2 ringunel1 x) = ringunel1 :=
  ringmult0x_is (ringaxs X).

Definition ringminus1 {X : ring} : X := ringminus1_is (ringaxs X).

Definition ringmultwithminus1 (X : ring) : ∏ x : X, op2 ringminus1 x = ringinv1 x :=
  ringmultwithminus1_is (ringaxs X).

Definition ringaddabgr (X : ring) : abgr := make_abgr (make_setwithbinop X op1) (ringop1axs X).
Coercion ringaddabgr : ring >-> abgr.

Definition ringmultmonoid (X : ring) : monoid := make_monoid (make_setwithbinop X op2) (ringop2axs X).

Declare Scope ring_scope.
Notation "x + y" := (op1 x y) : ring_scope.
Notation "x - y" := (op1 x (ringinv1 y)) : ring_scope.
Notation "x * y" := (op2 x y) : ring_scope.
Notation "0" := (ringunel1) : ring_scope.
Notation "1" := (ringunel2) : ring_scope.
Notation "-1" := (ringminus1) (at level 0) : ring_scope.
Notation " - x " := (ringinv1 x) : ring_scope.

Delimit Scope ring_scope with ring.

Definition ringtorig (X : ring) : rig := @make_rig _ (pr2 X).
Coercion ringtorig : ring >-> rig.

(** **** Homomorphisms of rings *)

Definition isringfun {X Y : ring} (f : X → Y) := @isrigfun X Y f.

Definition ringfun (X Y : ring) := rigfun X Y.


X, Y: ring
isaset (ringfun X Y)


X, Y: ring
isaset (ringfun X Y)

   
X, Y: ring
isofhlevel 2 (X → Y)
X, Y: ring
∏ x : X → Y, isofhlevel 2 (isrigfun x)

   
X, Y: ring
isofhlevel 2 (X → Y)
 
X, Y: ring
∏ t : X, isaset ((λ _ : X, Y) t)
 
X, Y: ring
x: X
isaset ((λ _ : X, Y) x)

     apply setproperty.
   
X, Y: ring
∏ x : X → Y, isofhlevel 2 (isrigfun x)
 
X, Y: ring
f: X → Y
isofhlevel 2 (isrigfun f)
 
X, Y: ring
f: X → Y
isaprop (isrigfun f)

     apply isapropisrigfun.
Defined.

Definition ringfunconstr {X Y : ring} {f : X → Y} (is : isringfun f) : ringfun X Y := rigfunconstr is.
Identity Coercion id_ringfun : ringfun >-> rigfun.

Definition ringaddfun {X Y : ring} (f : ringfun X Y) : monoidfun X Y := make_monoidfun (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition ringmultfun {X Y : ring} (f : ringfun X Y) :
  monoidfun (ringmultmonoid X) (ringmultmonoid Y) := make_monoidfun (pr2 (pr2 f)).

Definition ringiso (X Y : ring) := rigiso X Y.

Definition make_ringiso {X Y : ring} (f : X ≃ Y) (is : isringfun f) : ringiso X Y := f ,, is.
Identity Coercion id_ringiso : ringiso >-> rigiso.

Definition isringfuninvmap {X Y : ring} (f : ringiso X Y) : isringfun (invmap f) := isrigfuninvmap f.


(** **** (X = Y) ≃ (ringiso X Y)
    We use the following composition

                           (X = Y) ≃ (make_ring' X = make_ring' Y)
                                   ≃ ((pr1 (make_ring' X)) = (pr1 (make_ring' Y)))
                                   ≃ (ringiso X Y)

    where the third weak equivalence is given by univalence for rigs, [rig_univalence]. We define
    ring' to be able to apply [rig_univalence].
 *)

Local Definition ring' : UU :=
  ∑ D : (∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)),
        invstruct (@op1 (pr1 D)) (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 D))))).


R: ring
ring'


R: ring
ring'

  
R: ring
∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2
R: ring
(λ D : ∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2,
 invstruct op1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr112 D))))
  ?pr1

  
R: ring
∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2
 
R: ring
isrigops op1 op2

    
R: ring
isabmonoidop op1
R: ring
ismonoidop op2
R: ring
∏ x : pr1 R, (unel_is ?H1 * x)%ring = unel_is ?H1
R: ring
∏ x : pr1 R, (x * unel_is ?H1)%ring = unel_is ?H1
R: ring
isdistr op1 op2

    
R: ring
isabmonoidop op1
 
R: ring
ismonoidop op1
R: ring
iscomm op1

      
R: ring
ismonoidop op1
 exact (pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))).
      
R: ring
iscomm op1
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))).
    
R: ring
ismonoidop op2
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))).
    
R: ring
∏ x : pr1 R,
(unel_is
   (make_isabmonoidop
      (pr1
         (dirprod_pr1
            (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
      (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))) *
 x)%ring =
unel_is
  (make_isabmonoidop
     (pr1
        (dirprod_pr1
           (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
     (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
 exact (@mult0x_is_l (pr1 R) (@op1 (pr1 R)) (@op2 (pr1 R))
                          (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))
                          (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))) (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R))).
    
R: ring
∏ x : pr1 R,
(x *
 unel_is
   (make_isabmonoidop
      (pr1
         (dirprod_pr1
            (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
      (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))))%ring =
unel_is
  (make_isabmonoidop
     (pr1
        (dirprod_pr1
           (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
     (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
 exact (@multx0_is_l (pr1 R) (@op1 (pr1 R)) (@op2 (pr1 R))
                          (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))
                          (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))) (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R))).
    
R: ring
isdistr op1 op2
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R)).
  
R: ring
(λ D : ∑ X : setwith2binop, isrigops op1 op2,
 invstruct op1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr112 D))))
  (pr1 R,,
   make_isrigops
     (make_isabmonoidop
        (pr1
           (dirprod_pr1
              (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
        (dirprod_pr2
           (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))))
     (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))
     (mult0x_is_l
        (dirprod_pr1
           (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))
        (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))
        (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R)))
     (multx0_is_l
        (dirprod_pr1
           (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))
        (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R)))
        (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R))) (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 R)))
 exact (pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 R))))).
Defined.

ring

ring

setwith2binop

isringops op1 op2

isringops op1 op2

isgrop op1

isgrop op1

invstruct op1 ?is1

ismonoidop op1
 exact (dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)))))).

invstruct op1
  (dirprod_pr1
     (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr21 R)))))
 exact (pr2 R).

iscomm op1
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)))))).
