rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
as1:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
as2:= rigassoc2 X: isassoc op2
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x * pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x' * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x * pr2 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x' * pr1 x''))%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr1 x * pr2 x' * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x * pr2 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
as1:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
as2:= rigassoc2 X: isassoc op2
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x * pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x' * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x * pr2 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x' * pr1 x''))%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x' * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x * pr2 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition rigtoringunel2 (X : rig) : rigtoringcarrier X :=
  setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) (rigtoringunel2int X).


X: rig
islunit (rigtoringop2 X) (rigtoringunel2 X)


X: rig
islunit (rigtoringop2 X) (rigtoringunel2 X)

  
X: rig
∏ x : rigtoringcarrier X,
rigtoringop2 X (rigtoringunel2 X) x = x

  
X: rig
∏
x : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid X),
pr1
  (rigtoringop2 X (rigtoringunel2 X)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x) =
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
pr1
  (rigtoringop2 X (rigtoringunel2 X)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x) =
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop2int X (rigtoringunel2int X) x) =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) x)%type

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X (rigtoringunel2int X) x = x)%type

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 (rigtoringunel2int X) * pr1 x +
  pr2 (rigtoringunel2int X) * pr2 x)%ring,,
 (pr1 (rigtoringunel2int X) * pr2 x +
  pr2 (rigtoringunel2int X) * pr1 x)%ring = x)%type
 
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
((1%rig * pr1 x + 0%rig * pr2 x)%ring,,
 (1%rig * pr2 x + 0%rig * pr1 x)%ring = x)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
((1%rig * pr1 (x1,, x2) + 0%rig * pr2 (x1,, x2))%ring,,
 (1%rig * pr2 (x1,, x2) + 0%rig * pr1 (x1,, x2))%ring =
 x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring,,
 (1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x1,, x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring,,
 (1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring,,
 (1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring,,
 (1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x1,, x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring = x1)%type
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((1%rig * x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring = x1)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((x1 + 0%rig * x2)%ring = x1)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((x1 + 0%rig)%ring = x1)%type
 apply (ru1 x1).
  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((1%rig * x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((x2 + 0%rig * x1)%ring = x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
lu2:= riglunax2 X: islunit op2 1
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
m0x:= rigmult0x X: ∏ x : X, (0%rig * x)%ring = 0
((x2 + 0%rig)%ring = x2)%type
 apply (ru1 x2).
Qed.


X: rig
isrunit (rigtoringop2 X) (rigtoringunel2 X)


X: rig
isrunit (rigtoringop2 X) (rigtoringunel2 X)

  
X: rig
∏ x : rigtoringcarrier X,
rigtoringop2 X x (rigtoringunel2 X) = x

  
X: rig
∏
x : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
      (rigaddabmonoid X),
pr1
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (rigtoringunel2 X) =
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
pr1
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (rigtoringunel2 X) =
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop2int X x (rigtoringunel2int X)) =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) x)%type

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X x (rigtoringunel2int X) = x)%type
 
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 x * pr1 (rigtoringunel2int X) +
  pr2 x * pr2 (rigtoringunel2int X))%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 (rigtoringunel2int X) +
  pr2 x * pr1 (rigtoringunel2int X))%ring = x)%type

  
X: rig
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 x * 1%rig + pr2 x * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (pr1 x * 0%rig + pr2 x * 1%rig)%ring = x)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
((pr1 (x1,, x2) * 1%rig + pr2 (x1,, x2) * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (pr1 (x1,, x2) * 0%rig + pr2 (x1,, x2) * 1%rig)%ring =
 x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x1,, x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x1,, x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x1,, x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x1,, x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring = x1)%type
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x2)%type

  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 1%rig + x2 * 0%rig)%ring = x1)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 + x2 * 0%rig)%ring = x1)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 + 0%rig)%ring = x1)%type
 apply (ru1 x1).
  
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 0%rig + x2 * 1%rig)%ring = x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((x1 * 0%rig + x2)%ring = x2)%type
 
X: rig
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid X
ru1:= rigrunax1 X: isrunit op1 0
ru2:= rigrunax2 X: isrunit op2 1
lu1:= riglunax1 X: islunit op1 0
mx0:= rigmultx0 X: ∏ x : X, (x * 0%rig)%ring = 0
((0%rig + x2)%ring = x2)%type
 apply (lu1 x2).
Qed.

Definition rigtoringisunit (X : rig) : isunit (rigtoringop2 X) (rigtoringunel2 X) :=
  rigtoringlunit2 X ,, rigtoringrunit2 X.

Definition rigtoringisunital (X : rig) : isunital (rigtoringop2 X) :=
  rigtoringunel2 X ,, rigtoringisunit X.

Definition rigtoringismonoidop2 (X : rig) : ismonoidop (rigtoringop2 X) :=
  rigtoringassoc2 X ,, rigtoringisunital X.


X: rig
isldistr (rigtoringop1 X) (rigtoringop2 X)


X: rig
isldistr (rigtoringop1 X) (rigtoringop2 X)

  
X: rig
∏ x x' x'' : rigtoringcarrier X,
rigtoringop2 X x'' (rigtoringop1 X x x') =
rigtoringop1 X (rigtoringop2 X x'' x)
  (rigtoringop2 X x'' x')

  
X: rig
∏
x x'
 x'' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid X),
(rigtoringop2 X
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x'')
   (rigtoringop1 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')) =
 rigtoringop1 X
   (rigtoringop2 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'')
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x))
   (rigtoringop2 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'')
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')))%logic

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rigtoringop2 X
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
     x'')
  (rigtoringop1 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')) =
rigtoringop1 X
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'')
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x))
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'')
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'))

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop2int X x'' (rigtoringop1int X x x')) =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop1int X (rigtoringop2int X x'' x)
      (rigtoringop2int X x'' x')))%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X x'' (rigtoringop1int X x x') =
 rigtoringop1int X (rigtoringop2int X x'' x)
   (rigtoringop2int X x'' x'))%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X x''
   ((pr1 x + pr1 x')%ring,, (pr2 x + pr2 x')%ring) =
 (pr1 (rigtoringop2int X x'' x) +
  pr1 (rigtoringop2int X x'' x'))%ring,,
 (pr2 (rigtoringop2int X x'' x) +
  pr2 (rigtoringop2int X x'' x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 x'' * pr1 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * pr2 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * pr1 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring =
 (pr1
    (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x,,
     pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x) +
  pr1
    (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x',,
     pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring,,
 (pr2
    (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x,,
     pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x) +
  pr2
    (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x',,
     pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring,,
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring)%type
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr1 x'' * pr1 x' +
  pr2 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr1 x'' * pr1 x' +
  (pr2 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr2 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr1 x' + pr2 x'' * pr2 x'))%ring)%type

    apply (rr _ (pr1 x'' * pr1 x') (pr2 x'' * pr2 x) _).
  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr1 x'' * pr2 x' +
  pr2 x'' * (pr1 x + pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr1 x'' * pr2 x' +
  (pr2 x'' * pr1 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring =
 (pr1 x'' * pr2 x + pr2 x'' * pr1 x +
  (pr1 x'' * pr2 x' + pr2 x'' * pr1 x'))%ring)%type

    apply (rr _ (pr1 x'' * pr2 x') (pr2 x'' * pr1 x) _).
Qed.


X: rig
isrdistr (rigtoringop1 X) (rigtoringop2 X)


X: rig
isrdistr (rigtoringop1 X) (rigtoringop2 X)

  
X: rig
∏ x x' x'' : rigtoringcarrier X,
rigtoringop2 X (rigtoringop1 X x x') x'' =
rigtoringop1 X (rigtoringop2 X x x'')
  (rigtoringop2 X x' x'')

  
X: rig
∏
x x'
 x'' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
         (rigaddabmonoid X),
(rigtoringop2 X
   (rigtoringop1 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'))
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x'') =
 rigtoringop1 X
   (rigtoringop2 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x''))
   (rigtoringop2 X
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')
      (setquotpr
         (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'')))%logic

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rigtoringop2 X
  (rigtoringop1 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
     x'') =
rigtoringop1 X
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x''))
  (rigtoringop2 X
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x''))

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop2int X (rigtoringop1int X x x') x'') =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop1int X (rigtoringop2int X x x'')
      (rigtoringop2int X x' x'')))%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X (rigtoringop1int X x x') x'' =
 rigtoringop1int X (rigtoringop2int X x x'')
   (rigtoringop2int X x' x''))%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X
   ((pr1 x + pr1 x')%ring,, (pr2 x + pr2 x')%ring) x'' =
 (pr1 (rigtoringop2int X x x'') +
  pr1 (rigtoringop2int X x' x''))%ring,,
 (pr2 (rigtoringop2int X x x'') +
  pr2 (rigtoringop2int X x' x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'' +
  pr2 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring,,
 (pr1 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'' +
  pr2 (pr1 x + pr1 x',, pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1
    (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'',,
     pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'') +
  pr1
    (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x'',,
     pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring,,
 (pr2
    (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'',,
     pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'') +
  pr2
    (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x'',,
     pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring,,
 ((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring,,
 ((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring,,
 ((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring,,
 ((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring)%type
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr1 x' * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr2 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr1 x' * pr1 x'' +
  (pr2 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x * pr2 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr2 x''))%ring)%type

    apply (rr _ (pr1 x' * pr1 x'') (pr2 x * pr2 x'') _).
  
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x + pr2 x') * pr1 x'')%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
(((pr1 x + pr1 x') * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x', x'': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rr:= abmonoidoprer (rigop1axs X): ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
((pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr1 x' * pr2 x'' +
  (pr2 x * pr1 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring =
 (pr1 x * pr2 x'' + pr2 x * pr1 x'' +
  (pr1 x' * pr2 x'' + pr2 x' * pr1 x''))%ring)%type

    apply (rr _ (pr1 x' * pr2 x'') (pr2 x * pr1 x'') _).
Qed.

Definition rigtoringdistr (X : rig) : isdistr (rigtoringop1 X) (rigtoringop2 X) :=
  rigtoringldistr X ,, rigtoringrdistr X.


X: rig
ring


X: rig
ring

  
X: rig
isringops op1 op2

  
X: rig
isabgrop op1 × ismonoidop op2
X: rig
isdistr op1 op2

  
X: rig
isabgrop op1 × ismonoidop op2
 apply (rigtoringop1axs X ,, rigtoringismonoidop2 X).
  
X: rig
isdistr op1 op2
 apply (rigtoringdistr X).
Defined.


(** **** Canonical homomorphism to the ring associated with a rig (ring of differences) *)

Definition toringdiff (X : rig) (x : X) : rigtoring X := setquotpr _ (x ,, 0).


X: rig
isbinopfun (toringdiff X)


X: rig
isbinopfun (toringdiff X)

  
X: rig
isbinopfun (toringdiff X)
 
X: rig
∏ x x' : rigaddabmonoid X,
toringdiff X (x + x')%addmonoid =
(toringdiff X x + toringdiff X x')%addmonoid
 
X: rig
x, x': rigaddabmonoid X
(toringdiff X (x + x')%addmonoid =
 (toringdiff X x + toringdiff X x')%addmonoid)%type

  apply (isbinopfuntoabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X) x x').
Qed.


X: rig
(toringdiff X 0 = 0%ring)%type


X: rig
(toringdiff X 0 = 0%ring)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition isaddmonoidfuntoringdiff (X : rig) :
  @ismonoidfun (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigtoring X) (toringdiff X) :=
  isbinop1funtoringdiff X ,, isunital1funtoringdiff X.

isbinopfun (toringdiff X)

isbinopfun (toringdiff X)

toringdiff X (x + x')%addmonoid =
(toringdiff X x + toringdiff X x')%addmonoid
 
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(toringdiff X (x + x')%addmonoid =
 (toringdiff X x + toringdiff X x')%addmonoid)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) ((x * x')%ring,, 0) =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X)
   (rigtoringop2int X (x,, 0) (x',, 0)))%type

  
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring,, 0 =
 rigtoringop2int X (x,, 0) (x',, 0))%type
 
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring,, 0 =
 (pr1 (x,, 0%rig) * pr1 (x',, 0%rig) +
  pr2 (x,, 0%rig) * pr2 (x',, 0%rig))%ring,,
 (pr1 (x,, 0%rig) * pr2 (x',, 0%rig) +
  pr2 (x,, 0%rig) * pr1 (x',, 0%rig))%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring,, 0 =
 (x * x' + 0%rig * 0%rig)%ring,,
 (x * 0%rig + 0%rig * x')%ring)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring = (x * x' + 0%rig * 0%rig)%ring)%type
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(0 = (x * 0%rig + 0%rig * x')%ring)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring = (x * x' + 0%rig * 0%rig)%ring)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
((x * x')%ring = (x * x' + 0%rig)%ring)%type
 
X: rig

((x * x')%ring = (x * x')%ring)%type
 apply idpath.
  
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(0 = (x * 0%rig + 0%rig * x')%ring)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(0 = (x * 0%rig + 0%rig)%ring)%type

x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(0 = (0%rig + 0%rig)%ring)%type
 
X: rig
x, x': rigmultmonoid X
(0 = 0)%type

    apply idpath.
Defined.


X: rig
(toringdiff X 1 = 1%ring)%type


X: rig
(toringdiff X 1 = 1%ring)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition ismultmonoidfuntoringdiff (X : rig) :
  @ismonoidfun (rigmultmonoid X) (ringmultmonoid (rigtoring X)) (toringdiff X) :=
  isbinop2funtoringdiff X ,, isunital2funtoringdiff X.

Definition isrigfuntoringdiff (X : rig) : @isrigfun X (rigtoring X) (toringdiff X) :=
  isaddmonoidfuntoringdiff X ,, ismultmonoidfuntoringdiff X.

Definition isincltoringdiff (X : rig) (iscanc : ∏ x : X, @isrcancelable X (@op1 X) x) :
  isincl (toringdiff X) := isincltoabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X) iscanc.


(** **** Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal" on the ring associated with a rig *)

Definition rigtoringrel (X : rig) {R : hrel X} (is : @isbinophrel (rigaddabmonoid X) R) :
  hrel (rigtoring X) := abgrdiffrel (rigaddabmonoid X) is.

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
isringmultgt (rigtoring X) (rigtoringrel X is0)

→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
  → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R

∏
x
 x' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
        (rigaddabmonoid X),
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel X is0
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')
       0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0
         (setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x *
          setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')%ring
         0%ring)
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'))


  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel X is0
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa1)
     0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa2)
       0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0
         (setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
            xa1 *
          setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
            xa2)%ring 0%ring)
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa1)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa2))

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R xa1 (0,, 0)
→ abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R xa2 (0,, 0)
  → abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R
      (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) (0,, 0)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + pr2 xa1 + c0)%addmonoid)
→ (∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
   R (pr1 xa2 + pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
     (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + pr2 xa2 + c0)%addmonoid)
  → ∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
    R
      (pr1 (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) +
       pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
      (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) +
       pr2 (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) + c0)%addmonoid
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : X,
   R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
     (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : X,
     R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
       (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring)
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : X,
       R
         (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 +
          0%rig + c0)%ring
         (0%rig +
          (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2

isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(∑ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring)
→ (∑ c0 : X,
   R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
     (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring)
  → ∑ c0 : X,
    R
      (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
       c0)%ring
      (0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) +
       c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R

:

(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 * pr1 xa2 + a1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + (x1 * pr2 xa2 + a1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

R: hrel X

is: isrigmultgt X R

  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 * x2 + a1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + (x1 * pr2 xa2 + a1 * x2) + c0)%ring

R: hrel X

is: isrigmultgt X R

comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1

:

isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)

  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2) + c0)%ring

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
R
  (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig +
   (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
    (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring
  (0%rig + (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2) +
   (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
    (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring
     (0%rig + (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2) +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 +
      (x1 * c2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 +
      (x1 * c2 +
       (a1 * c2 +
        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 +
      (x1 * c2 +
       (a1 * c2 +
        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring)

R: hrel X

is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,

  (pr1 t22)

a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)

pr1

     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 +

        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 +
      (x1 * c2 +
       (a1 * c2 +
        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring)

is: isrigmultgt X R

comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)

isaprop

   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)

R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 +
      (a1 * x2 +
       (a1 * c2 +
        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring)

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2

isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)

  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring

R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

  (pr1 t21)

 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

  (pr1 t22)

a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1

     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 +

     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 +
      (a1 * x2 +
       (a1 * c2 +
        (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))))%ring)

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2

isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,

   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring)

r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 +
      (a1 * a2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 +
      (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 + (a1 * a2 + a1 * c2) +
      (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 +
      (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2 +
       (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2))))%ring)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 + (a1 * a2 + a1 * c2) +
      (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 + (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2) +
      (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring)

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 + (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2) +
      (a1 * a2 + a1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 + (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2) +
      (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * x2 + x1 * c2 + (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2) +
      (a1 * a2 + a1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring
     (x1 * a2 + x1 * c2 + (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2) +
      (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring)

  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     (x1 * (x2 + c2) + (c1 * x2 + c1 * c2) +

      (a1 * x2 + a1 * c2 + (c1 * a2 + c1 * c2)))%ring)

R: hrel X

(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,

   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring)

r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     ((x1 + c1) * (x2 + c2) +
      (a1 * (a2 + c2) + c1 * (a2 + c2)))%ring
     (x1 * (a2 + c2) + c1 * (x2 + c2) +
      (a1 * (x2 + c2) + c1 * (a2 + c2)))%ring)

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
rer:= abmonoidrer (rigaddabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,

a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)

pr1

     ((x1 + c1) * (x2 + c2) + (a1 + c1) * (a2 + c2))%ring

      (a1 * (x2 + c2) + c1 * (a2 + c2)))%ring)

  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     ((x1 + c1) * (x2 + c2) + (a1 + c1) * (a2 + c2))%ring
     (x1 * (a2 + c2) + c1 * (x2 + c2) +
      (c1 * (a2 + c2) + a1 * (x2 + c2)))%ring)

R: hrel X

is: isrigmultgt X R
assoc:= rigassoc1 X: isassoc op1
comm:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1

  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
pr1
  (R
     ((x1 + c1) * (x2 + c2) + (a1 + c1) * (a2 + c2))%ring
     (x1 * (a2 + c2) + c1 * (a2 + c2) +
      (c1 * (x2 + c2) + a1 * (x2 + c2)))%ring)

:
∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring: ∏ a b c d : X,
(a + b + (c + d))%ring = (a + c + (b + d))%ring
ld:= rigldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
rd:= rigrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
  (rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t21: X
c1:= pr1 t22: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + c2)%ring (a2 + c2)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1 (R (x1 + c1)%ring (a1 + c1)%ring)
pr1
  (R
     ((x1 + c1) * (x2 + c2) + (a1 + c1) * (a2 + c2))%ring
     ((x1 + c1) * (a2 + c2) + (a1 + c1) * (x2 + c2))%ring)

  apply (is _ _ _ _ r2 r1).
Qed.


X: rig
R: hrel X
is: isbinophrel R
is': isinvbinophrel R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (rigtoringrel X is)


X: rig
R: hrel X
is: isbinophrel R
is': isinvbinophrel R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (rigtoringrel X is)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is: isbinophrel R
is': isinvbinophrel R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (rigtoringrel X is)
 apply (isdecabgrdiffrel (rigaddabmonoid X) is is' isd). Defined.

is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R

X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
∏
x
 x' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
        (rigaddabmonoid X),
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel X is0
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x *
      setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')%ring
     0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
       0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0
         (setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x')
         0%ring)
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x'))


    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel X is0
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa1 *
      setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa2)%ring
     0%ring
   → rigtoringrel X is0
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa1)
       0%ring
     → rigtoringrel X is0
         (setquotpr
            (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
            xa2) 0%ring)
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa1)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) xa2))

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R
  (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) (0,, 0)
→ abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R xa1 (0,, 0)
  → abgrdiffrelint (rigaddabmonoid X) R xa2 (0,, 0)

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
 R
   (pr1 (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) +
    pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) +
    pr2 (rigtoringop2int X xa1 xa2) + c0)%addmonoid)
→ (∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
   R (pr1 xa1 + pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
     (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + pr2 xa1 + c0)%addmonoid)
  → ∃ c0 : rigaddabmonoid X,
    R (pr1 xa2 + pr2 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + c0)%addmonoid
      (pr1 (0%rig,, 0%rig) + pr2 xa2 + c0)%addmonoid
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : X,
   R
     (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
      c0)%ring
     (0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) +
      c0)%ring)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : X,
     R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
       (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring)
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : X,
       R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
         (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
(∑ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) +
    c0)%ring)
→ (∑ c0 : X,
   R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
     (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring)
  → ∑ c0 : X,
    R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
      (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop

t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X

R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R

is: isinvrigmultgt X R

t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R

isaprop

xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)

R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop

R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X

 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
∑ c0 : X,
R (x2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring

 R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring

  (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +

a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a2 + c0)%ring

  (pr1 xa1)
r1: pr1 (R (x1 + c1)%ring (a1 + c1)%ring)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x2 + c0)%ring (a2 + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X

a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)

  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
r1':= pr2 is1 x1 a1 c1 r1: R x1 a1
∑ c0 : X, R (x2 + c0)%ring (a2 + c0)%ring

X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
  (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa1 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : X,
 R
   (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
    c0)%ring
   (0%rig +
    (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring)
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2:= pr2 t22: R
  (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
   pr1 t22)%ring
  (0%rig +
   (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) +
   pr1 t22)%ring
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
r2: R
  (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig +
   pr1 t22)%ring
  (0%rig +
   (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) +
   pr1 t22)%ring
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig + c2)%ring
     (0%rig + (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2) + c2)%ring)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R

isaprop

r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + 0%rig + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
∑ c0 : X,
R (x1 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring

R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop

→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
