R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (0%rig + a1 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
r1: (λ c0 : X,
 R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
   (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring) (pr1 t21)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1
  (R (x2 + 0%rig + c1)%ring
     (0%rig + a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + 0%rig + c1)%ring (a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring

is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,

(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)

R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X

  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + c1)%ring (a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X

  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c1:= pr1 t21: X

x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
r1':= pr2 is1 x2 a2 c1 r1: R x2 a2
∑ c0 : X, R (x1 + c0)%ring (a1 + c0)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring

c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + c1)%ring (a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
r1':= pr2 is1 x2 a2 c1 r1: R x2 a2
R (x1 + 0%rig)%ring (a1 + 0%rig)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + c1)%ring (a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
r1':= pr2 is1 x2 a2 c1 r1: R x2 a2
R x1 (a1 + 0%rig)%ring
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isinvbinophrel R
is: isinvrigmultgt X R
int: ∏ a b : rigtoring X,
isaprop
(rigtoringrel X is0 (a * b)%ring 0%ring
→ rigtoringrel X is0 b 0%ring → rigtoringrel X is0 a 0%ring)
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X) (rigaddabmonoid X)
t22: ∑ c0 : X,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring
(0%rig + (pr1 xa1 * pr2 xa2 + pr2 xa1 * pr1 xa2) + c0)%ring
t21: ∑ c0 : X, R (pr1 xa2 + 0%rig + c0)%ring (0%rig + pr2 xa2 + c0)%ring
c2:= pr1 t22: X
c1:= pr1 t21: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: rigaddabmonoid X
a2:= pr2 xa2: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa2)
r1: pr1 (R (x2 + c1)%ring (a2 + c1)%ring)
x1:= pr1 xa1: rigaddabmonoid X
a1:= pr2 xa1: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid X, rigaddabmonoid X)
  (pr1 xa1)
r2: pr1
  (R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2 + c2)%ring
     (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2 + c2)%ring)
r2':= pr2 is1 (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring
  (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring c2 r2: R (x1 * x2 + a1 * a2)%ring (x1 * a2 + a1 * x2)%ring
r1':= pr2 is1 x2 a2 c1 r1: R x2 a2
R x1 a1

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ _ r2' r1').
Qed.


(** **** Relations and the canonical homomorphism to the ring associated with a rig (ring of differences) *)


X: rig
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
iscomprelrelfun L (rigtoringrel X is0) (toringdiff X)


X: rig
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
iscomprelrelfun L (rigtoringrel X is0) (toringdiff X)

  apply (iscomptoabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)).
Qed.

Close Scope rig_scope.


(** *** Commutative rings *)

(** **** General definitions *)

Definition iscommring (X : setwith2binop) : UU := iscommringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X).

Definition commring : UU := ∑ (X : setwith2binop), iscommringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X).

Definition make_commring (X : setwith2binop) (is : iscommringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) :
  ∑ X0 : setwith2binop, iscommringops op1 op2 :=
  X ,, is.

Definition commringconstr {X : hSet} (opp1 opp2 : binop X)
           (ax11 : isgrop opp1) (ax12 : iscomm opp1)
           (ax21 : ismonoidop opp2) (ax22 : iscomm opp2)
           (dax : isdistr opp1 opp2) : commring :=
  @make_commring (make_setwith2binop X (opp1 ,, opp2))
               ((((ax11 ,, ax12) ,, ax21) ,, dax) ,, ax22).

Definition commringtoring : commring → ring := λ X, @make_ring (pr1 X) (pr1 (pr2 X)).
Coercion commringtoring : commring >-> ring.

Definition ringcomm2 (X : commring) : iscomm (@op2 X) := pr2 (pr2 X).

Definition commringop2axs (X : commring) : isabmonoidop (@op2 X) :=
  ringop2axs X ,, ringcomm2 X.

Definition ringmultabmonoid (X : commring) : abmonoid :=
  make_abmonoid (make_setwithbinop X op2) (ringop2axs X ,, ringcomm2 X).

Definition commringtocommrig (X : commring) : commrig := make_commrig _ (pr2 X).
Coercion commringtocommrig : commring >-> commrig.


(** **** (X = Y) ≃ (ringiso X Y)
    We use the following composition

                          (X = Y) ≃ (make_commring' X = make_commring' Y)
                                  ≃ ((pr1 (make_commring' X)) = (pr1 (make_commring' Y)))
                                  ≃ (ringiso X Y)

    where the third weak equivalence is given by univalence for ring, [ring_univalence]. We define
    [commring'] to be able to use [ring_univalence].
 *)

Local Definition commring' : UU :=
  ∑ D : (∑ X : setwith2binop, isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)), iscomm (@op2 (pr1 D)).

Local Definition make_commring' (CR : commring) : commring' :=
  (pr1 CR ,, dirprod_pr1 (pr2 CR)) ,, dirprod_pr2 (pr2 CR).

Definition commring_univalence_weq1 : commring ≃ commring' :=
  weqtotal2asstol
    (λ X : setwith2binop, isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X))
    (λ (y : (∑ (X : setwith2binop), isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X))), iscomm (@op2 (pr1 y))).

Definition commring_univalence_weq1' (X Y : commring) : (X = Y) ≃ (make_commring' X = make_commring' Y) :=
  make_weq _ (@isweqmaponpaths commring commring' commring_univalence_weq1 X Y).


X, Y: commring
make_commring' X = make_commring' Y
≃ pr1 (make_commring' X) = pr1 (make_commring' Y)


X, Y: commring
make_commring' X = make_commring' Y
≃ pr1 (make_commring' X) = pr1 (make_commring' Y)

  
X, Y: commring
isPredicate
  (λ D : ∑ X : setwith2binop, isringops op1 op2,
   iscomm op2)

  
X, Y: commring
w: ∑ X : setwith2binop, isringops op1 op2
isaprop (iscomm op2)
 use isapropiscomm.
Defined.
Opaque commring_univalence_weq2.

Definition commring_univalence_weq3 (X Y : commring) :
  ((pr1 (make_commring' X)) = (pr1 (make_commring' Y))) ≃ (ringiso X Y) :=
  ring_univalence (pr1 (make_commring' X)) (pr1 (make_commring' Y)).


X, Y: commring
X = Y → ringiso X Y


X, Y: commring
X = Y → ringiso X Y

  
X, Y: commring
e: (X = Y)%type
ringiso X Y
 
X: commring
ringiso X X
 exact (idrigiso X).
Defined.


X, Y: commring
isweq (commring_univalence_map X Y)


X, Y: commring
isweq (commring_univalence_map X Y)

  
X, Y: commring
X = Y → ringiso X Y
X, Y: commring
homotsec ?f1 (commring_univalence_map X Y)
X, Y: commring
isweq ?f1

  
X, Y: commring
X = Y → ringiso X Y
 exact (weqcomp (commring_univalence_weq1' X Y)
                   (weqcomp (commring_univalence_weq2 X Y) (commring_univalence_weq3 X Y))).
  
X, Y: commring
homotsec
  (commring_univalence_weq3 X Y
   ∘ commring_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ commring_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq
  (commring_univalence_map X Y)
 
X, Y: commring
e: (X = Y)%type
((commring_univalence_weq3 X Y
  ∘ commring_univalence_weq2 X Y
  ∘ commring_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq e =
 commring_univalence_map X Y e)%type
 
X: commring
((commring_univalence_weq3 X X
  ∘ commring_univalence_weq2 X X
  ∘ commring_univalence_weq1' X X)%weq (idpath X) =
 commring_univalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    
X: commring
((commring_univalence_weq3 X X
  ∘ commring_univalence_weq2 X X)%weq
   (commring_univalence_weq1' X X (idpath X)) =
 commring_univalence_map X X (idpath X))%type

    exact weqcomp_to_funcomp_app.
  
X, Y: commring
isweq
  (commring_univalence_weq3 X Y
   ∘ commring_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ commring_univalence_weq1' X Y)%weq
 use weqproperty.
Defined.
Opaque commring_univalence_isweq.

Definition commring_univalence (X Y : commring) : (X = Y) ≃ (ringiso X Y)
  := make_weq
    (commring_univalence_map X Y)
    (commring_univalence_isweq X Y).


(** **** Computational lemmas for commutative rings *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.


X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
iscancelable op2 x


X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
iscancelable op2 x

  
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
iscancelable op2 x
 
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
islcancelable op2 x
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x

  
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
islcancelable op2 x
 apply (ringismultlcancelableif X x isl).
  
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x
 
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
∏ y : X, y * x = 0 → y = 0
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isr: ∏ y : X, y * x = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x

    
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
y: X
e: (y * x = 0)%type
(y = 0)%type
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isr: ∏ y : X, y * x = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x
 
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
y: X
e: (x * y = 0)%type
(y = 0)%type
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isr: ∏ y : X, y * x = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x
 
X: commring
x: X
isl: ∏ y : X, x * y = 0 → y = 0
isr: ∏ y : X, y * x = 0 → y = 0
isrcancelable op2 x

    apply (ringismultrcancelableif X x isr).
Qed.

Close Scope ring_scope.


(** **** Subobjects *)


X: commring
A: subring X
iscommringops op1 op2


X: commring
A: subring X
iscommringops op1 op2

  
X: commring
A: subring X
iscommringops op1 op2
 
X: commring
A: subring X
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (@isabmonoidcarrier (ringmultabmonoid X) (multsubmonoid A))).
Defined.

Definition carrierofasubcommring {X : commring} (A : @subring X) : commring :=
  make_commring A (iscommringcarrier A).


(** **** Quotient objects *)


X: commring
R: ringeqrel
iscommringops op1 op2


X: commring
R: ringeqrel
iscommringops op1 op2

  
X: commring
R: ringeqrel
iscommringops op1 op2
 
X: commring
R: ringeqrel
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (@isabmonoidquot (ringmultabmonoid X) (ringmultmonoideqrel R))).
Defined.

Definition commringquot {X : commring} (R : @ringeqrel X) : commring :=
  make_commring (setwith2binopquot R) (iscommringquot R).


(** **** Direct products *)


X, Y: commring
iscommringops op1 op2


X, Y: commring
iscommringops op1 op2

  
X, Y: commring
iscommringops op1 op2
 
X, Y: commring
iscomm op2

  apply (pr2 (isabmonoiddirprod (ringmultabmonoid X) (ringmultabmonoid Y))).
Defined.

Definition commringdirprod (X Y : commring) : commring :=
  make_commring (setwith2binopdirprod X Y) (iscommringdirprod X Y).

(** **** Opposite commutative rings *)

Local Open Scope ring.

(** We reuse much of the proof for general rigs *)
Definition opposite_commring (X : commring) : commring :=
  pr1 (X⁰),, pr2 (X⁰) ,, λ x y, @ringcomm2 X y x.

(** Commutativity makes taking the opposite trivial *)
Definition iso_commring_opposite (X : commring) : rigiso X (opposite_commring X) :=
  iso_commrig_opposite X.

Local Close Scope rig.

(** **** Commutative rigs to commutative rings *)

Local Open Scope rig_scope.


X: commrig
iscomm (rigtoringop2 X)


X: commrig
iscomm (rigtoringop2 X)

  
X: commrig
∏ x x' : rigtoringcarrier X,
rigtoringop2 X x x' = rigtoringop2 X x' x

  
X: commrig
∏
x
 x' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
        (rigaddabmonoid X),
(rigtoringop2 X
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x)
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x') =
 rigtoringop2 X
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x')
   (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
      x))%logic

  
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
rigtoringop2 X
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
     x') =
rigtoringop2 X
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X))
     x')
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)

  
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) (rigtoringop2int X x x') =
 setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring X) (rigtoringop2int X x' x))%type

  
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
(rigtoringop2int X x x' = rigtoringop2int X x' x)%type

x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
((pr1 x * pr1 x' + pr2 x * pr2 x')%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x' + pr2 x * pr1 x')%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr1 x + pr2 x' * pr2 x)%ring,,
 (pr1 x' * pr2 x + pr2 x' * pr1 x)%ring)%type

  (rigaddabmonoid X)
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
((pr1 x * pr1 x' + pr2 x * pr2 x')%ring,,
 (pr1 x * pr2 x' + pr2 x * pr1 x')%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr1 x + pr2 x' * pr2 x)%ring,,
 (pr1 x' * pr2 x + pr2 x' * pr1 x)%ring)%type

x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)

((pr1 x' * pr1 x + pr2 x' * pr2 x)%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr1 x + pr2 x' * pr2 x)%ring)%type

    apply idpath.
  
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
cm2:= rigcomm2 X: iscomm op2
((pr1 x * pr2 x' + pr2 x * pr1 x')%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr2 x + pr2 x' * pr1 x)%ring)%type
 
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
cm2:= rigcomm2 X: iscomm op2
((pr2 x' * pr1 x + pr2 x * pr1 x')%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr2 x + pr2 x' * pr1 x)%ring)%type
 
X: commrig
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid X)
  (rigaddabmonoid X)
cm1:= rigcomm1 X: iscomm op1
cm2:= rigcomm2 X: iscomm op2
((pr2 x' * pr1 x + pr1 x' * pr2 x)%ring =
 (pr1 x' * pr2 x + pr2 x' * pr1 x)%ring)%type

    apply cm1.
Qed.


X: commrig
commring


X: commrig
commring

  
X: commrig
iscommringops op1 op2
 
X: commrig
isringops op1 op2
X: commrig
iscomm op2

  
X: commrig
isringops op1 op2
 apply (pr2 (rigtoring X)).
  
X: commrig
iscomm op2
 apply (commrigtocommringcomm2 X).
Defined.

Close Scope rig_scope.


(** **** Rings of fractions *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.

Definition commringfracop1int (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X))
  : binop (X × S)
  := λ (x1s1 x2s2 : X × S),
      pr1 (pr2 x2s2) * pr1 x1s1 + pr1 (pr2 x1s1) * pr1 x2s2 ,,
      op (pr2 x1s1) (pr2 x2s2).

Definition commringfracop2int (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  binop (X × S) := abmonoidfracopint (ringmultabmonoid X) S.

Definition commringfracunel1int (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  X × S := 0 ,, unel S.

Definition commringfracunel2int (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  X × S := 1 ,, unel S.

Definition commringfracinv1int (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  X × S → X × S := λ xs, -1 * pr1 xs ,, pr2 xs.

Definition eqrelcommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  eqrel (X × S) := eqrelabmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X) S.


X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type


X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
rdistr:= ringrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type
 
X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
rdistr:= ringrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
rdistr:= ringrdistr X: isrdistr op1 op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type

 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type

assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
((s3 * x1 + s1 * x3) * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type


  
X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X

eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type

comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2

((s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) + s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4)) *
 (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 + s2 * x4) * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type

 (a1 * a2) =

 s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 (s4 * x2 * (s1 * s3) + s2 * x4 * (s1 * s3)) *
 (a1 * a2))%type

 s4 * x2 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
(x1 * s2 * a1 * s3 * (s4 * a2) =
 s4 * (x1 * s2 * a1) * (s3 * a2))%type
 
X: commring

comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2

(x1 * s2 * a1 * s3 * (s4 * a2) =
 x1 * s2 * a1 * s4 * (s3 * a2))%type

comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2

 s4 * x2 * (s3 * s1) * (a2 * a1))%type
(x3 * s4 * a2 * s1 * (s2 * a1) =

eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type

op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
e1: (s3 * x1 * (s4 * s2) * (a2 * a1) =
 s4 * x2 * (s3 * s1) * (a2 * a1))%type
(x3 * s4 * a2 * s2 * (s1 * a1) =
 x3 * s4 * a2 * s2 * (s1 * a1))%type

    apply idpath.
  
X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
e1: (s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s4 * x2 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type
e2: (s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s2 * x4 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type
(s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) +
 s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s4 * x2 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2) +
 s2 * x4 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type

  
X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
e2: (s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s2 * x4 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type
(s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) +
 s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) +
 s2 * x4 * (s1 * s3) * (a1 * a2))%type
 
X: commring
x1, x2, x3, x4, a1, a2, s1, s2, s3, s4: X
eq1: (x1 * s2 * a1 = x2 * s1 * a1)%type
eq2: (x3 * s4 * a2 = x4 * s3 * a2)%type
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
op2axs:= commringop2axs X: isabmonoidop op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer op2axs: ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
(s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) +
 s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) =
 s3 * x1 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2) +
 s1 * x3 * (s2 * s4) * (a1 * a2))%type
 apply idpath.
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomprelrelfun2 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (commringfracop1int X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomprelrelfun2 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (commringfracop1int X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomprelrelfun2 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (commringfracop1int X S)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xs1 xs2
→ eqrelcommringfrac X S xs3 xs4
  → eqrelcommringfrac X S
      (commringfracop1int X S xs1 xs3)
      (commringfracop1int X S xs2 xs4)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 =
      pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type)
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
       ((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
        (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
ff:= @hinhfun2: ∏ X Y Z : UU, (X → Y → Z) → ∥ X ∥ → ∥ Y ∥ → ∥ Z ∥
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 =
      pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type)
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
       ((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
        (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
ff:= @hinhfun2: ∏ X Y Z : UU,
(X → Y → Z)
→ ishinh_UU X → ishinh_UU Y → ishinh_UU Z
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 =
      pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type)
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
       ((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
        (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
ff:= @hinhfun2: ∏ X Y Z : UU,
(X → Y → Z)
→ ishinh_UU X → ishinh_UU Y → ishinh_UU Z
(∑ a0 : pr1 S,
 (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 =
  pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type)
→ (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type)
  → ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
    ((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
     (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
      pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
     (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
     (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
      pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
(∑ a0 : pr1 S,
 (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 =
  pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type)
→ (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type)
  → ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
    ((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
     (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
      pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
     (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
     (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
      pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) * pr1 a0 =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) * pr1 a0)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
eq1:= pr2 tt1: (λ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type) (pr1 tt1)
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
eq1:= pr2 tt1: (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr11 tt1 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr11 tt1)%type
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
eq1:= pr2 tt1: (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr11 tt1 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr11 tt1)%type
eq2:= pr2 tt2: (λ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type) (pr1 tt2)
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
eq1:= pr2 tt1: (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr11 tt1 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr11 tt1)%type
eq2:= pr2 tt2: (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr11 tt2 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr11 tt2)%type
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs2) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs4)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs1) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs3)) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
xs1, xs2, xs3, xs4: X × S
tt1: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr1 a0)%type
tt2: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr1 a0 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr1 a0)%type
eq1:= pr2 tt1: (pr1 xs1 * pr12 xs2 * pr11 tt1 = pr1 xs2 * pr12 xs1 * pr11 tt1)%type
eq2:= pr2 tt2: (pr1 xs3 * pr12 xs4 * pr11 tt2 = pr1 xs4 * pr12 xs3 * pr11 tt2)%type
((pr12 xs3 * pr1 xs1 + pr12 xs1 * pr1 xs3) *
 (pr12 xs2 * pr12 xs4) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid =
 (pr12 xs4 * pr1 xs2 + pr12 xs2 * pr1 xs4) *
 (pr12 xs1 * pr12 xs3) *
 pr1 (pr1 tt1 + pr1 tt2)%addmonoid)%type

  apply (commringfracl1 X (pr1 xs1) (pr1 xs2) (pr1 xs3) (pr1 xs4)
                       (pr1 (pr1 tt1)) (pr1 (pr1 tt2)) (pr1 (pr2 xs1))
                       (pr1 (pr2 xs2)) (pr1 (pr2 xs3)) (pr1 (pr2 xs4)) eq1 eq2).
Qed.

Definition commringfracop1 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S)) :=
  setquotfun2 (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
              (commringfracop1int X S) (commringfracop1comp X S).


X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type


X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type
 
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type
 
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * (s' * x + s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * (s' * x) + s'' * (s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + s * (s'' * x' + s' * x''))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * (s' * x) + s'' * (s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s' * s'' * x + (s * (s'' * x') + s * (s' * x'')))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * (s' * x) + s'' * (s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * (s'' * x') + s * (s' * x'')))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * s' * x + s'' * (s * x') + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * (s'' * x') + s * (s' * x'')))%type
 
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * s' * x + s'' * s * x' + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * (s'' * x') + s * (s' * x'')))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * s' * x + s'' * s * x' + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * s'' * x' + s * (s' * x'')))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * s' * x + s * s'' * x' + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * s'' * x' + s * (s' * x'')))%type

  
X: commring
x, x', x'', s, s', s'': X
ldistr:= ringldistr X: isldistr op1 op2
comm2:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
assoc1:= ringassoc1 X: isassoc op1
(s'' * s' * x + s * s'' * x' + s * s' * x'' =
 s'' * s' * x + (s * s'' * x' + s * s' * x''))%type

  apply (assoc1 ((s'' * s') * x) ((s * s'') * x') ((s * s') * x'')).
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isassoc (commringfracop1 X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isassoc (commringfracop1 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isassoc (commringfracop1 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
isassoc (commringfracop1 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
isassoc (commringfracop1 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
isassoc add1

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R
  (commringfracop1int X S
     (commringfracop1int X S xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R
  (commringfracop1int X S xs
     (commringfracop1int X S xs' xs''))
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R
  (pr12 xs'' *
   pr1
     (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
      (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) +
   pr12 (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
         (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs'',,
   (pr2
      ((pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs')%ring,,
       pr2 xs + pr2 xs') + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid) =
setquotpr R
  (pr12 (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
         (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs +
   pr12 xs *
   pr1
     (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
      (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid),,
   (pr2 xs +
    pr2
      ((pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'')%ring,,
       pr2 xs' + pr2 xs''))%addmonoid)
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(setquotpr R
   (pr12 xs'' *
    pr1
      (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
       (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) +
    pr12 (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
          (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs'',,
    (pr2
       ((pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs')%ring,,
        pr2 xs + pr2 xs') + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid) =
 setquotpr R
   (pr12 (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
          (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs +
    pr12 xs *
    pr1
      (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
       (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid),,
    (pr2 xs +
     pr2
       ((pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'')%ring,,
        pr2 xs' + pr2 xs''))%addmonoid))%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs'' *
 pr1
   (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
    (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) +
 pr12 (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
       (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs'',,
 (pr2
    ((pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs')%ring,,
     pr2 xs + pr2 xs') + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid =
 pr12 (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
       (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid) * pr1 xs +
 pr12 xs *
 pr1
   (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'',,
    (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs'')%addmonoid),,
 (pr2 xs +
  pr2
    ((pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'')%ring,,
     pr2 xs' + pr2 xs''))%addmonoid)%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs'' * (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs') +
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') * pr1 xs'',,
 make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
   ((pr12 S)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs) (pr2 xs'))) (pr2 xs'')) =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'') * pr1 xs +
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs''),,
 make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
     pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'')))
   ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs') (pr2 xs'')))))%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs'' * (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs') +
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') * pr1 xs'' =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'') * pr1 xs +
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs''))%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
   ((pr12 S)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs) (pr2 xs'))) 
      (pr2 xs'')) =
 make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
     pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'')))
   ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs') (pr2 xs'')))))%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs'' * (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs') +
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') * pr1 xs'' =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'') * pr1 xs +
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs''))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs'' * (pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs') +
 pr12 xs * pr12 xs' * pr1 xs'' =
 pr12 xs' * pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs +
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs'' * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs''))%type

    apply (commringfracl2 X (pr1 xs) (pr1 xs') (pr1 xs'') (pr1 (pr2 xs))
                         (pr1 (pr2 xs')) (pr1 (pr2 xs''))).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
   ((pr12 S)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs) (pr2 xs'))) (pr2 xs'')) =
 make_carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
    (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
     pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'')))
   ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs)
      (make_carrier (pr1 S)
         (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
          pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
         ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs') (pr2 xs'')))))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr1carrier (pr1 S)
   (make_carrier (pr1 S)
      (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
       pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
       pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
      ((pr12 S)
         (make_carrier (pr1 S)
            (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
             pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'))
            ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs) (pr2 xs'))) (pr2 xs''))) =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S)
   (make_carrier (pr1 S)
      (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
       (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
        pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs'')))
      ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs)
         (make_carrier (pr1 S)
            (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs') *
             pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs''))
            ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs') (pr2 xs''))))))%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr1
   (make_carrier (pr1 S)
      (pr12 xs * pr12 xs' * pr12 xs'')
      ((pr12 S)
         (make_carrier (pr1 S) (pr12 xs * pr12 xs')
            ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs) (pr2 xs'))) (pr2 xs''))) =
 pr1
   (make_carrier (pr1 S)
      (pr12 xs * (pr12 xs' * pr12 xs''))
      ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs)
         (make_carrier (pr1 S) (pr12 xs' * pr12 xs'')
            ((pr12 S) (pr2 xs') (pr2 xs''))))))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
(pr12 xs * pr12 xs' * pr12 xs'' =
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs' * pr12 xs''))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
(pr12 xs * pr12 xs' * pr12 xs'' =
 pr12 xs * (pr12 xs' * pr12 xs''))%type

    apply (assoc2 (pr1 (pr2 xs)) (pr1 (pr2 xs')) (pr1 (pr2 xs''))).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
int: ∏ xs xs' xs'' : X × S,
setquotpr R (add1int (add1int xs xs') xs'') =
setquotpr R (add1int xs (add1int xs' xs''))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
add1 (add1 x x') x'' = add1 x (add1 x' x'')
 apply (setquotuniv3prop R (λ x x' x'', _ = _)), int.
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomm (commringfracop1 X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomm (commringfracop1 X S)

iscomm (commringfracop1 X S)

R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)

R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
iscomm add1

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ x x' : setquotinset R, add1 x x' = add1 x' x

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ x x' : X × S,
(add1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
 add1 (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x))%logic

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs': X × S
add1 (setquotpr R xs) (setquotpr R xs') =
add1 (setquotpr R xs') (setquotpr R xs)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs': X × S
(add1int xs xs' = add1int xs' xs)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs': X × S
(commringfracop1int X S xs xs' =
 commringfracop1int X S xs' xs)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs': X × S
(pr12 xs' * pr1 xs + pr12 xs * pr1 xs',,
 (pr2 xs + pr2 xs')%addmonoid =
 pr12 xs * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 xs,,
 (pr2 xs' + pr2 xs)%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
xs': X × S
(pr12 xs' * pr1 (x,, s) + pr12 (x,, s) * pr1 xs',,
 (pr2 (x,, s) + pr2 xs')%addmonoid =
 pr12 (x,, s) * pr1 xs' + pr12 xs' * pr1 (x,, s),,
 (pr2 xs' + pr2 (x,, s))%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
xs': X × S
(pr12 xs' * pr1 (x,, s,, iss) +
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 xs',,
 (pr2 (x,, s,, iss) + pr2 xs')%addmonoid =
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 xs' +
 pr12 xs' * pr1 (x,, s,, iss),,
 (pr2 xs' + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': S
(pr12 (x',, s') * pr1 (x,, s,, iss) +
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (x',, s'),,
 (pr2 (x,, s,, iss) + pr2 (x',, s'))%addmonoid =
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (x',, s') +
 pr12 (x',, s') * pr1 (x,, s,, iss),,
 (pr2 (x',, s') + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(pr12 (x',, s',, iss') * pr1 (x,, s,, iss) +
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (x',, s',, iss'),,
 (pr2 (x,, s,, iss) + pr2 (x',, s',, iss'))%addmonoid =
 pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (x',, s',, iss') +
 pr12 (x',, s',, iss') * pr1 (x,, s,, iss),,
 (pr2 (x',, s',, iss') + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s' * x + s * x',,
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (s * s')
   ((pr12 S) (s,, iss) (s',, iss')) =
 s * x' + s' * x,,
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (s' * s)
   ((pr12 S) (s',, iss') (s,, iss)))%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s' * x + s * x' = s * x' + s' * x)%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(make_carrier (pr1 S) (s * s')
   ((pr12 S) (s,, iss) (s',, iss')) =
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (s' * s)
   ((pr12 S) (s',, iss') (s,, iss)))%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s' * x + s * x' = s * x' + s' * x)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s' * x + s * x' = s * x' + s' * x)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s' * x + s * x' = s' * x + s * x')%type
 apply idpath.
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(make_carrier (pr1 S) (s * s')
   ((pr12 S) (s,, iss) (s',, iss')) =
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (s' * s)
   ((pr12 S) (s',, iss') (s,, iss)))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(pr1carrier (pr1 S)
   (make_carrier (pr1 S) (s * s')
      ((pr12 S) (s,, iss) (s',, iss'))) =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S)
   (make_carrier (pr1 S) (s' * s)
      ((pr12 S) (s',, iss') (s,, iss))))%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s * s' = s' * s)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
(s * s' = s' * s)%type
 apply (ringcomm2 X).
Qed.

Definition commringfracunel1 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S) := setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (commringfracunel1int X S).

Definition commringfracunel2 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S) := setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (commringfracunel2int X S).

    (commringfracinv1int X S xs')

xs, xs': X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xs * pr12 xs' * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xs' * pr12 xs * pr1 a0)%type)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (-1 * pr1 xs * pr12 xs' * pr1 a0 =
      -1 * pr1 xs' * pr12 xs * pr1 a0)%type)

ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs, xs': X × S
tt0: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xs * pr12 xs' * pr1 a0 =
 pr1 xs' * pr12 xs * pr1 a0)%type
x:= pr1 xs: X
s:= pr12 xs: ringmultabmonoid X
x':= pr1 xs': X
s':= pr12 xs': ringmultabmonoid X
a0:= pr11 tt0: pr1 X
(-1 * (x * s' * a0) = -1 * (x' * s * a0))%type

  apply (maponpaths (λ x0 : X, -1 * x0) (pr2 tt0)).
Defined.

Definition commringfracinv1 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S) → setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S) :=
  setquotfun (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
             (commringfracinv1int X S) (commringfracinv1comp X S).

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isinv (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S)
  (commringfracinv1 X S)

  (commringfracinv1 X S)

  (commringfracinv1 X S)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)

inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
islinv add1 (commringfracunel1 X S) inv1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
islinv add1 (commringfracunel1 X S) inv1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
islinv add1 (commringfracunel1 X S) inv1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
islinv add1 qunel1 inv1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
islinv add1 qunel1 inv1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
∏ x : setquotinset R, add1 (inv1 x) x = qunel1

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
∏ x : X × S,
pr1
  (add1 (inv1 (setquotpr R x)) (setquotpr R x) =
   qunel1)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
pr1
  (add1 (inv1 (setquotpr R xs)) (setquotpr R xs) =
   qunel1)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
R (add1int (inv1int xs) xs) qunel1int

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   ((pr12 xs * (-1 * pr1 xs) + pr12 xs * pr1 xs) *
    0%addmonoid * pr1 a0 =
    0 *
    (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
     pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs)) * pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
((pr12 xs * (-1 * pr1 xs) + pr12 xs * pr1 xs) *
 0%addmonoid * pr1 a0 =
 0 *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs)) * pr1 a0)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
((pr12 xs * (-1 * pr1 xs) + pr12 xs * pr1 xs) *
 0%addmonoid * pr1 0%addmonoid =
 0 *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs)) * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
x:= pr1 xs: X
((pr12 xs * (-1 * x) + pr12 xs * x) * 0%addmonoid *
 pr1 0%addmonoid =
 0 *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs)) * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
x:= pr1 xs: X
s:= pr12 xs: ringmultabmonoid X
((s * (-1 * x) + s * x) * 0%addmonoid *
 pr1 0%addmonoid =
 0 *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xs)) * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
x:= pr1 xs: X
s:= pr12 xs: ringmultabmonoid X
((s * (-1 * x) + s * x) * 1 * 1 = 0 * (s * s) * 1)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
x:= pr1 xs: X
s:= pr12 xs: ringmultabmonoid X
(s * (-1 * x + x) * 1 * 1 = 0 * (s * s) * 1)%type

qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)

(s * (- x + x) * 1 * 1 = 0 * (s * s) * 1)%type

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
inv1:= commringfracinv1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
→ setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
inv1int:= commringfracinv1int X S: X × S → X × S
qunel1int:= commringfracunel1int X S: X × S
qunel1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
assoc2:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
xs: X × S
x:= pr1 xs: X
s:= pr12 xs: ringmultabmonoid X
(0 = 0 * 1)%type

    exact (!ringmult0x X 1).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isl: islinv (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S) (commringfracinv1 X S)
isinv (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S)
  (commringfracinv1 X S)

  exact (isl ,, weqlinvrinv _ (commringfraccomm1 X S) _ (commringfracinv1 X S) isl).
Qed.

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
∏ x : setquotinset R, add1 un1 x = x

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
∏ x : X × S,
pr1 (add1 un1 (setquotpr R x) = setquotpr R x)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
pr1 (add1 un1 (setquotpr R xs) = setquotpr R xs)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
(add1int (commringfracunel1int X S) xs = xs)%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
e0: (add1int (commringfracunel1int X S) xs = xs)%type
pr1 (add1 un1 (setquotpr R xs) = setquotpr R xs)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
(add1int (commringfracunel1int X S) xs = xs)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
(commringfracop1int X S (commringfracunel1int X S) xs =
 xs)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
(pr12 xs * pr1 (commringfracunel1int X S) +
 pr12 (commringfracunel1int X S) * pr1 xs,,
 (pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 xs)%addmonoid =
 xs)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: S
(pr12 (x,, s) * pr1 (commringfracunel1int X S) +
 pr12 (commringfracunel1int X S) * pr1 (x,, s),,
 (pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 (x,, s))%addmonoid =
 x,, s)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (commringfracunel1int X S) +
 pr12 (commringfracunel1int X S) * pr1 (x,, s,, iss),,
 (pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid =
 x,, s,, iss)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(pr12 (x,, s,, iss) * pr1 (commringfracunel1int X S) +
 pr12 (commringfracunel1int X S) * pr1 (x,, s,, iss) =
 x)%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
((pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid =
 s,, iss)%type

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)

s: ringmultabmonoid X

 pr12 (commringfracunel1int X S) * pr1 (x,, s,, iss) =
 x)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(s * 0 + 0%addmonoid * x = x)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)

un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(s * 0 + 1 * x = x)%type

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)

un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(0 + 1 * x = x)%type

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
