un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(0 + x = x)%type

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(x = x)%type

      apply idpath.
    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
((pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid =
 s,, iss)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(pr1carrier (pr1 S)
   (pr2 (commringfracunel1int X S) + pr2 (x,, s,, iss))%addmonoid =
 pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss))%type

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
(1 * s = s)%type
 apply (ringlunax2 X s).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
un1:= commringfracunel1 X S: setquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
xs: X × S
e0: (add1int (commringfracunel1int X S) xs = xs)%type
pr1 (add1 un1 (setquotpr R xs) = setquotpr R xs)

  apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) e0).
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrunit (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrunit (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrunit (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracunel1 X S)

  apply (weqlunitrunit (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfraccomm1 X S)
                       (commringfracunel1 X S) (commringfraclunit1 X S)).
Qed.

Definition commringfracunit1 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  ismonoidop (commringfracop1 X S)
  := commringfracassoc1 X S ,,
    commringfracunel1 X S ,,
    commringfraclunit1 X S ,,
    commringfracrunit1 X S.

Definition commringfracop2 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S)) := abmonoidfracop (ringmultabmonoid X) S.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomm (commringfracop2 X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomm (commringfracop2 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscomm (commringfracop2 X S)

  apply (commax (abmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X) S)).
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) mult1

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
isldistr (commringfracop1 X S) mult1

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
isldistr add1 mult1

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ x x' x'' : setquotinset R,
mult1 x'' (add1 x x') =
add1 (mult1 x'' x) (mult1 x'' x')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
∏ x x' x'' : X × S,
(mult1 (setquotpr R x'')
   (add1 (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')) =
 add1 (mult1 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x))
   (mult1 (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x')))%logic

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
mult1 (setquotpr R xs'')
  (add1 (setquotpr R xs) (setquotpr R xs')) =
add1 (mult1 (setquotpr R xs'') (setquotpr R xs))
  (mult1 (setquotpr R xs'') (setquotpr R xs'))

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
xs, xs', xs'': X × S
R (mult1int xs'' (add1int xs xs'))
  (add1int (mult1int xs'' xs) (mult1int xs'' xs'))


  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
xs', xs'': X × S
R (mult1int xs'' (add1int (x,, s) xs'))
  (add1int (mult1int xs'' (x,, s)) (mult1int xs'' xs'))
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
xs'': X × S
R (mult1int xs'' (add1int (x,, s) (x',, s')))
  (add1int (mult1int xs'' (x,, s))
     (mult1int xs'' (x',, s')))

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': S
R (mult1int (x'',, s'') (add1int (x,, s) (x',, s')))
  (add1int (mult1int (x'',, s'') (x,, s))
     (mult1int (x'',, s'') (x',, s')))
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
R
  (mult1int (x'',, s'',, iss'')
     (add1int (x,, s) (x',, s')))
  (add1int (mult1int (x'',, s'',, iss'') (x,, s))
     (mult1int (x'',, s'',, iss'') (x',, s')))

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (x'' * (pr1 s' * x + pr1 s * x') *
    (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s *
     (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) * pr1 a0 =
    (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s' * (x'' * x) +
     s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * (x'' * x')) *
    (s'' *
     (pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) *
    pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(x'' * (pr1 s' * x + pr1 s * x') *
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s *
  (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) * pr1 a0 =
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s' * (x'' * x) +
  s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) *
 pr1 a0)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: S
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
(x'' * (pr1 s' * x + pr1 s * x') *
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s *
  (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) * pr1 0%addmonoid =
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s' * (x'' * x) +
  s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (pr1carrier (pr1 S) s * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) *
 pr1 0%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': S
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
(x'' * (pr1 s' * x + pr1 (s,, iss) * x') *
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) *
  (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) * pr1 0%addmonoid =
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) s' * (x'' * x) +
  s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' *
  (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) *
   pr1carrier (pr1 S) s')) * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
(x'' * (pr1 (s',, iss') * x + pr1 (s,, iss) * x') *
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) *
  (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s',, iss'))) *
 pr1 0%addmonoid =
 (s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s',, iss') * (x'' * x) +
  s'' * pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' *
  (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s,, iss) *
   pr1carrier (pr1 S) (s',, iss'))) * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
(x'' * (s' * x + s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) *
 0%addmonoid =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) + s'' * s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (s * s')) * 0%addmonoid)%type


  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
(x'' * (s' * x + s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) + s'' * s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (s * s')) * 1)%type


  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
((x'' * (s' * x) + x'' * (s * x')) *
 (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) + s'' * s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (s * s')) * 1)%type

  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) + s'' * s * (x'' * x')) *
 (s'' * (s * s')) * 1)%type

  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type

iss'': S s''
assoc:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
((x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) +
  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type
 
X: commring

add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

iss: S s

s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
assoc:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
((x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) +
  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type

comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
((x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) +
  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type

 s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')))%type

s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
assoc:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
(x'' * x * s' * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 x'' * x * (s'' * s') * (s'' * (s * s')))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
(x'' * x * s' * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 x'' * x * (s'' * s') * (s'' * s * s'))%type

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)

comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
(x'' * x * s' * (s'' * s' * (s'' * s)) =
 x'' * x * s' * (s'' * s' * (s'' * s)))%type

    apply idpath.
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
x: X
s: ringmultabmonoid X
iss: S s
x': X
s': ringmultabmonoid X
iss': S s'
x'': X
s'': ringmultabmonoid X
iss'': S s''
assoc:= ringassoc2 X: isassoc op2
comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
e1: (x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')))%type
((x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) +
  x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1int:= commringfracop2int X S: binop (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1int:= commringfracop1int X S: binop (X × S)
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

comm:= ringcomm2 X: iscomm op2
rer:= abmonoidoprer (commringop2axs X): ∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
e1: (x'' * (s' * x) * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')))%type
(x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s')))%type

e2: (x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =

 s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')))%type
e2: (x'' * (s * x') * (s'' * s * (s'' * s')) =
 s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s')))%type
((s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1 =
 (s'' * s' * (x'' * x) * (s'' * (s * s')) +
  s'' * s * (x'' * x') * (s'' * (s * s'))) * 1)%type
 apply idpath.
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrdistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrdistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isrdistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)

  apply (weqldistrrdistr (commringfracop1 X S) (commringfracop2 X S)
                         (commringfraccomm2 X S) (commringfracldistr X S)).
Defined.

(** Notes :

1. Construction of the addition on the multiplicative monoid of fractions
   requires only commutativity and associativity of multiplication and (right)
   distributivity. No properties of the addition are used.

2. The proof of associtivity for the addition on the multiplicative monoid of
   fractions requires in the associativity of the original addition but no other
   properties.
*)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
commring

commring

commring

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
commring

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
commring

R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
commring

mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
isgrop add1

add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
invstruct add1 (commringfracunit1 X S)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
isinv add1 (unel_is (commringfracunit1 X S))
  (commringfracinv1 X S)

    apply (commringfracisinv1 X S).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomm add1
 apply (commringfraccomm1 X S).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
ismonoidop mult1
 apply (pr2 (abmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X) S)).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomm mult1
 apply (commringfraccomm2 X S).
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R:= eqrelcommringfrac X S: eqrel (X × S)
mult1:= commringfracop2 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
add1:= commringfracop1 X S: binop (setquotinset (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
uset:= setquotinset R: hSet
isdistr add1 mult1
 apply (commringfracldistr X S ,, commringfracrdistr X S).
Defined.

Definition prcommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  X → S → commringfrac X S := λ x s, setquotpr _ (x ,, s).


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
∏ a a' : S,
isinvertible op2 (prcommringfrac X S (pr1 a) a')


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
∏ a a' : S,
isinvertible op2 (prcommringfrac X S (pr1 a) a')

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
a, a': S
isinvertible op2 (prcommringfrac X S (pr1 a) a')

  apply (invertibilityinabmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X) S).
Defined.


(** **** Canonical homomorphism to the ring of fractions *)

Definition tocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) (x : X) :
  commringfrac X S := setquotpr _ (x ,, unel S).


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isbinopfun (tocommringfrac X S)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isbinopfun (tocommringfrac X S)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
isbinopfun (tocommringfrac X S)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
∏ x x' : X,
tocommringfrac X S (x + x')%addmonoid =
(tocommringfrac X S x + tocommringfrac X S x')%addmonoid
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(tocommringfrac X S (x + x')%addmonoid =
 (tocommringfrac X S x + tocommringfrac X S x')%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
   (x + x',, 0%addmonoid) =
 setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
   (commringfracop1int X S (x,, 0%addmonoid)
      (x',, 0%addmonoid)))%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x',, 0%addmonoid =
 commringfracop1int X S (x,, 0%addmonoid)
   (x',, 0%addmonoid))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x',, 0%addmonoid =
 pr12 (x',, 0%addmonoid) * pr1 (x,, 0%addmonoid) +
 pr12 (x,, 0%addmonoid) * pr1 (x',, 0%addmonoid),,
 (pr2 (x,, 0) + pr2 (x',, 0))%addmonoid)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x',, 0%addmonoid =
 0%addmonoid * x + 0%addmonoid * x',,
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (0%addmonoid * 0%addmonoid)
   ((pr12 S) 0%addmonoid 0%addmonoid))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x' = 0%addmonoid * x + 0%addmonoid * x')%type
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(0%addmonoid =
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (0%addmonoid * 0%addmonoid)
   ((pr12 S) 0%addmonoid 0%addmonoid))%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x' = 0%addmonoid * x + 0%addmonoid * x')%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x' = x + 0%addmonoid * x')%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(x + x' = x + x')%type
 apply idpath.
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(0%addmonoid =
 make_carrier (pr1 S) (0%addmonoid * 0%addmonoid)
   ((pr12 S) 0%addmonoid 0%addmonoid))%type
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, x': X
(0%addmonoid = (0 + 0)%addmonoid)%type

    exact (!runax S _).
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 0 = 0)%type


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 0 = 0)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 0 = 0)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition isaddmonoidfuntocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  @ismonoidfun X (commringfrac X S) (tocommringfrac X S) :=
  isbinop1funtocommringfrac X S ,, isunital1funtocommringfrac X S.

Definition tocommringfracandminus0 (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) (x : X) :
  tocommringfrac X S (- x) = - tocommringfrac X S x :=
  binopfun_preserves_inv _ (isbinop1funtocommringfrac X S) x.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, y: X
(tocommringfrac X S (x - y) =
 tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y)%type


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, y: X
(tocommringfrac X S (x - y) =
 tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, y: X
(tocommringfrac X S (x - y) =
 tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, y: X
(tocommringfrac X S x + tocommringfrac X S (- y) =
 tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x, y: X
(tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y =
 tocommringfrac X S x - tocommringfrac X S y)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition isbinop2funtocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  @isbinopfun (ringmultmonoid X) (ringmultmonoid (commringfrac X S)) (tocommringfrac X S) :=
  isbinopfuntoabmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X) S.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 1 = 1)%type


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 1 = 1)%type

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
(tocommringfrac X S 1 = 1)%type

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition ismultmonoidfuntocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  @ismonoidfun (ringmultmonoid X) (ringmultmonoid (commringfrac X S)) (tocommringfrac X S) :=
  isbinop2funtocommringfrac X S ,, isunital2funtocommringfrac X S.

Definition isringfuntocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  @isringfun X (commringfrac X S) (tocommringfrac X S) :=
  isaddmonoidfuntocommringfrac X S ,, ismultmonoidfuntocommringfrac X S.


(** **** Ring of fractions in the case when all elements which are being inverted are cancelable *)

Definition hrelcommringfrac0 (X : commring) (S : @submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) :
  hrel (X × S) :=
  λ xa yb : setdirprod X S, (pr1 xa) * (pr1 (pr2 yb)) = (pr1 yb) * (pr1 (pr2 xa)).


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa'
≃ hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa'
≃ hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa'
≃ hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa'
≃ hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa'
≃ hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
   pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)
≃ pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
→ pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
      pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
isaprop
  (ishinh_UU
     (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
      (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
       pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type))
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
isaprop (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
→ pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
(∑ a0 : pr1 S,
 (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
  pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
→ (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%logic

    
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
ae: ∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
 pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type
pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
a: pr1 S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a =
 pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a)%type
pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa

    apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (iscanc a) _ _ eq).
  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
     (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
      pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
   (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
    pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type)
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
 pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 0%addmonoid =
 pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type

    
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' =
 pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 0%addmonoid)%type
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
eq: (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type

    apply eq.
  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
isaprop
  (ishinh_UU
     (∑ a0 : pr1 S,
      (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' * pr1 a0 =
       pr1 xa' * pr12 xa * pr1 a0)%type))
 apply (isapropishinh _).
  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
xa, xa': X × S
isaprop (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
 apply (setproperty X).
Qed.


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
∏ a' : S, isincl (λ x : X, prcommringfrac X S x a')


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
∏ a' : S, isincl (λ x : X, prcommringfrac X S x a')

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
isincl (λ x : X, prcommringfrac X S x a')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
isaset X
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
isaset (commringfrac X S)
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
∏ x x' : X,
prcommringfrac X S x a' = prcommringfrac X S x' a'
→ x = x'

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
isaset (commringfrac X S)
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
∏ x x' : X,
prcommringfrac X S x a' = prcommringfrac X S x' a'
→ x = x'
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
∏ x x' : X,
prcommringfrac X S x a' = prcommringfrac X S x' a'
→ x = x'

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
prcommringfrac X S x a' = prcommringfrac X S x' a'
→ x = x'
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
e: (prcommringfrac X S x a' =
 prcommringfrac X S x' a')%type
(x = x')%type

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
e: (prcommringfrac X S x a' =
 prcommringfrac X S x' a')%type
e':= invweq
  (weqpathsinsetquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (x,, a') (x',, a')) e: eqrelcommringfrac X S (x,, a') (x',, a')
(x = x')%type

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
e: (prcommringfrac X S x a' =
 prcommringfrac X S x' a')%type
e':= invweq
  (weqpathsinsetquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (x,, a') (x',, a')) e: eqrelcommringfrac X S (x,, a') (x',, a')
e'':= weqhrelhrel0commringfrac X S iscanc 
  (x,, a') (x',, a') e': hrelcommringfrac0 X S (x,, a') (x',, a')
(x = x')%type

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
e: (prcommringfrac X S x a' =
 prcommringfrac X S x' a')%type
e':= invweq
  (weqpathsinsetquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (x,, a') (x',, a')) e: eqrelcommringfrac X S (x,, a') (x',, a')
e'':= weqhrelhrel0commringfrac X S iscanc 
  (x,, a') (x',, a') e': (x * pr1 a' = x' * pr1 a')%type
(x = x')%type
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
a': S
x, x': X
e: (prcommringfrac X S x a' =
 prcommringfrac X S x' a')%type
e':= invweq
  (weqpathsinsetquot (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (x,, a') (x',, a')) e: eqrelcommringfrac X S (x,, a') (x',, a')
e'':= weqhrelhrel0commringfrac X S iscanc 
  (x,, a') (x',, a') e': (x * pr1 a' = x' * pr1 a')%type
(x * pr1carrier S a' = x' * pr1carrier S a')%type
 apply e''.
Defined.

Definition isincltocommringfrac (X : commring) (S : @submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X))
           (iscanc : ∏ a : S, isrcancelable (@op2 X) (pr1carrier _ a)) :
  isincl (tocommringfrac X S) := isinclprcommringfrac X S iscanc (unel S).


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq (commringfrac X S)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq (commringfrac X S)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq (commringfrac X S)
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
∏ x x' : X × S, isdecprop (eqrelcommringfrac X S x x')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
isdecprop (eqrelcommringfrac X S xa xa')

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
isdecprop (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
isaprop (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
isofhlevel 1 (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
∏ x x' : pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa,
iscontr (x = x')%type
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
int:= setproperty X (pr1 xa * pr12 xa')
  (pr1 xa' * pr12 xa): isaprop
  (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
∏ x x' : pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa,
iscontr (x = x')%type
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
int:= setproperty (pr1 X) (pr1 xa * pr12 xa')
  (pr1 xa' * pr12 xa): isaprop
  (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
∏ x x' : pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa,
iscontr (x = x')%type
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa'
⨿ neg (hrelcommringfrac0 X S xa xa')
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)
⨿ neg (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
iscanc: ∏ a : S, isrcancelable op2 (pr1carrier S a)
is: isdeceq X
xa, xa': X × S
(pr1 xa * pr12 xa' = pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
⨿ (pr1 xa * pr12 xa' != pr1 xa' * pr12 xa)%type
 apply (is _ _).
Defined.


(** **** Relations similar to "greater" or "greater or equal"  on the rings of fractions *)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
ispartbinophrel S R


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
ispartbinophrel S R

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
ispartbinophrel S R
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
∏ a b c : ringmultabmonoid X,
S c → R a b → R (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
∏ a b c : ringmultabmonoid X,
S c → R a b → R (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
∏ a b c : ringmultabmonoid X,
S c → R a b → R (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
a, b, c: ringmultabmonoid X
s: S c
rab: R a b
R (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid

    apply (isringmultgttoislringmultgt X is0 is1 _ _ _ (is2 c s) rab).
  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
∏ a b c : ringmultabmonoid X,
S c → R a b → R (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
a, b, c: ringmultabmonoid X
s: S c
rab: R a b
R (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid

    apply (isringmultgttoisrringmultgt X is0 is1 _ _ _ (is2 c s) rab).
Defined.

Definition commringfracgt (X : commring) (S : @submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)) {R : hrel X}
           (is0 : @isbinophrel (rigaddabmonoid X) R) (is1 : isringmultgt X R)
           (is2 : ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0) : hrel (commringfrac X S) :=
  abmonoidfracrel (ringmultabmonoid X) S (ispartbinopcommringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2).


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
isringmultgt (commringfrac X S)
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
isringmultgt (commringfrac X S)
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
isringmultgt (commringfrac X S)
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
isringmultgt (commringfrac X S)
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
→ commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
  → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
→ commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
  → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))

    
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
a, b, c: commringfrac X S
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))

    
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
a, b, c: commringfrac X S
commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
→ isofhlevel 1
    (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
a, b, c: commringfrac X S
t: commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
isofhlevel 1
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))

    
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
a, b, c: commringfrac X S
t: commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
→ isofhlevel 1
    (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
a, b, c: commringfrac X S
t: commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
t0: commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
isofhlevel 1
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b))

    apply (pr2 _).
  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
→ commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
  → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 (c * a) (c * b)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
∏ x x' x'' : X × S,
make_hProp
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'') 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x')
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
         (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'' *
          setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
         (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'' *
          setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'))
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x')
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x''))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
make_hProp
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3) 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2)
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
         (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3 *
          setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)
         (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3 *
          setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2))
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
abmonoidfracrelint (ringmultabmonoid X) S R xa3
  (0,, 0%addmonoid)
→ abmonoidfracrelint (ringmultabmonoid X) S R xa1 xa2
  → abmonoidfracrelint (ringmultabmonoid X) S R
      (commringfracop2int X S xa3 xa1)
      (commringfracop2int X S xa3 xa2)

a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)

isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 S,
   R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
     (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 S,
     R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0))
  → ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 S,
       R
         (pr1 xa3 * pr1 xa1 *
          (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
           pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) * pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 * pr1 xa2 *
          (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
           pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) * pr1 c0))

R
  (pr1 xa3 * x1 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 * x2 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) * pr1 c0)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X

is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)

a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)

isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))

R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)

   (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0))

c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R
  (x3 * x1 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) * pr1 c0)
  (x3 * x2 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) * pr1 c0)

a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X

a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R
  (x3 * x1 *

    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) * pr1 c0)
  (x3 * x2 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) * pr1 c0)

S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)

isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t21: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)

c1:= pr1 c1s: pr1 X
r1:= pr2 t21: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
   (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t21)
c2s:= pr1 t22: pr1 S
c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t22)

a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R
  (x3 * x1 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) *
   pr1 (c1s + c2s)%addmonoid)
  (x3 * x2 *
   (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
    pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) *
   pr1 (c1s + c2s)%addmonoid)

S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0

         (c * a) (c * b))

t21: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)

 R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)

c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t22)

a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
pr1
  (R (x3 * x1 * (a3 * a2) * (c1 * c2))
     (x3 * x2 * (a3 * a1) * (c1 * c2)))

         (c * a) (c * b))

R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)

  (pr1 t22)

   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t21: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c1s:= pr1 t21: pr1 S
c1:= pr1 c1s: pr1 X
r1: R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr11 t21)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr11 t21)
c2s:= pr1 t22: pr1 S
c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2:= pr2 t22: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (x3 * c1 * (x1 * a2 * c2))
  (x3 * c1 * (x2 * a1 * c2))

a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)

:

isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t21: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c1s:= pr1 t21: pr1 S
c1:= pr1 c1s: pr1 X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
r1: pr1 (R (x3 * c1) (0 * c1))
c2s:= pr1 t22: pr1 S
c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2: R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr11 t22)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr11 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
R (x3 * c1 * (x1 * a2 * c2))
  (x3 * c1 * (x2 * a1 * c2))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 c 0
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
     → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 
         (c * a) (c * b))
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t21: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa3 * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)
  (0 * pr12 xa3 * pr1 c0)
t22: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c1s:= pr1 t21: pr1 S
c1:= pr1 c1s: pr1 X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
r1: pr1 (R (x3 * c1) 0)
c2s:= pr1 t22: pr1 S
c2:= pr1 c2s: pr1 X
r2: R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr11 t22)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr11 t22)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
R (x3 * c1 * (x1 * a2 * c2))
  (x3 * c1 * (x2 * a1 * c2))

  apply ((isringmultgttoislringmultgt X is0 is1) _ _ _ r1 r2).
Qed.

    apply (pr2 _).

S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
∏ x x' x'' : X × S,
make_hProp
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x')
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'' +
        setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)%addmonoid
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x'' +
        setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x')%addmonoid)
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x')
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x''))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
make_hProp
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2)
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3 +
        setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)%addmonoid
       (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3 +
        setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2)%addmonoid)
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa2)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) xa3))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
abmonoidfracrelint (ringmultabmonoid X) S R xa1 xa2
→ abmonoidfracrelint (ringmultabmonoid X) S R
    (commringfracop1int X S xa3 xa1)
    (commringfracop1int X S xa3 xa2)

xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 S,
   R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 S,
     R
       ((pr12 xa1 * pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa3 * pr1 xa1) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa2)) * pr1 c0)
       ((pr12 xa2 * pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa3 * pr1 xa2) *
        (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa3) *
         pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 xa1)) * pr1 c0))

S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X

  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
pr1
  (R ((a1 * x3 + a3 * x1) * (a3 * a2 * c0))
     ((a2 * x3 + a3 * x2) * (a3 * a1) * c0))

x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
pr1

     ((a2 * x3 + a3 * x2) * (a3 * a1 * c0)))

is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (a3 * x1 * (a3 * (a2 * c0)))
  (a3 * x2 * (a3 * (a1 * c0)))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (a3 * a3 * (x1 * (a2 * c0)))
  (a3 * x2 * (a3 * (a1 * c0)))
 
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (a3 * a3 * (x1 * (a2 * c0)))
  (a3 * a3 * (x2 * (a1 * c0)))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (a3 * a3 * (x1 * a2 * c0))
  (a3 * a3 * (x2 * (a1 * c0)))

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
rer2:= abmonoidrer (ringmultabmonoid X)
:
∏ a b c d : X, a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d): ∏ a b c d : X,
a * b * (c * d) = a * c * (b * d)
int: ∏ a b c : commringfrac X S,
isaprop
  (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2 a b
   → commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2
       (c + a)%addmonoid 
       (c + b)%addmonoid)
xa1, xa2, xa3: X × S
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)
c0s:= pr1 t2: pr1 S
c0:= pr1 c0s: pr1 X
r:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 S,
 R (pr1 xa1 * pr12 xa2 * pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 * pr12 xa1 * pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: ringmultabmonoid X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: ringmultabmonoid X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: ringmultabmonoid X
R (a3 * a3 * (x1 * a2 * c0))
  (a3 * a3 * (x2 * a1 * c0))

  apply ((isringmultgttoislringmultgt X is0 is1)
           _ _ _ (is2 _ (pr2 (@op S (pr2 xa3) (pr2 xa3)))) r).
Qed.


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
is': ispartinvbinophrel S R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
is': ispartinvbinophrel S R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)

  
X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0
is': ispartinvbinophrel S R
isd: isdecrel R
isdecrel (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)

  apply (isdecabmonoidfracrel
           (ringmultabmonoid X) S (ispartbinopcommringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2) is' isd).
Defined.


X: commring
Y: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
gt: StrongOrder X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hle: isbinophrel gt
Hmult: isringmultgt X gt
Hpos: ∏ c : X, Y c → gt c 0
(commringfracgt X Y Hle Hmult Hpos =
 StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt)%type


X: commring
Y: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
gt: StrongOrder X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hle: isbinophrel gt
Hmult: isringmultgt X gt
Hpos: ∏ c : X, Y c → gt c 0
(commringfracgt X Y Hle Hmult Hpos =
 StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt)%type

  
X: commring
Y: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
gt: StrongOrder X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hle: isbinophrel gt
Hmult: isringmultgt X gt
Hpos: ∏ c : X, Y c → gt c 0
x: commringfrac X Y
(commringfracgt X Y Hle Hmult Hpos x =
 StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x)%type

  
X: commring
Y: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
gt: StrongOrder X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hle: isbinophrel gt
Hmult: isringmultgt X gt
Hpos: ∏ c : X, Y c → gt c 0
x, y: commringfrac X Y
(commringfracgt X Y Hle Hmult Hpos x y =
 StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x y)%type

  
X: commring
Y: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
gt: StrongOrder X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hle: isbinophrel gt
Hmult: isringmultgt X gt
Hpos: ∏ c : X, Y c → gt c 0
x, y: commringfrac X Y
(ispartbinopcommringfracgt X Y Hle Hmult Hpos = Hgt)%type

  apply isaprop_ispartbinophrel.
Defined.

(** **** Relations and the canonical homomorphism to the ring of fractions *)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → L c 0
iscomprelrelfun L (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)
  (tocommringfrac X S)


X: commring
S: submonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
L: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel L
is1: isringmultgt X L
is2: ∏ c : X, S c → L c 0
iscomprelrelfun L (commringfracgt X S is0 is1 is2)
  (tocommringfrac X S)

  apply (iscomptoabmonoidfrac (ringmultabmonoid X)).
Qed.

Close Scope ring_scope.
